Name: OPAL OMAN
Description:
Oman Energy Association (OPAL) is the premier non-governmental, non-profit organization representing Oman’s Energy and Minerals sector. Established in 1998, OPAL unites more than 520 member companies with a shared vision to promote industry standards, address common challenges, and exchange best practices. 

OPAL’s work is driven by four core departments:

1/ HSE & Standardization: Leads Health, Safety, and Environment (HSE) standardization and digitalization across the sector, coordinates with operators and government bodies, and promotes knowledge sharing through events and studies.

2/ Quality & Accreditation: Enhances compliance and service quality through initiatives like the OPAL STAR, conducting audits and developing standards to ensure operational excellence.

3/ Human Capital Development (HCD) & CSR Initiatives: Develops national workforce capabilities through National Occupational Standards (NOS), training programs, and skill certifications while driving In-Country Value (ICV) and Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiatives.

4/ Member Network Management: Strengthens engagement with OPAL members, supports collaboration across the Energy and Minerals sector, and oversees communications, events, and committees.

Name: Immensa
Description:
Immensa is the global leader in advanced spare parts digitization and secure digital warehousing, helping energy and industrial companies transform how they access and source spare parts.

Through Immensa360, our ISO 27001-certified digital warehousing platform, we enable clients to securely store, organize, and control their digitized spare parts in a centralized system, ensuring data protection, instant accessibility, and availability for on-demand production.

Our comprehensive digital inventory solutions cover every stage of the journey: from on-site 3D scanning and data capturing, reverse engineering, digital twin validation, and secure cloud storage. Once digitized, every part becomes a verified digital asset within Immensa360, complete with metadata, version control, and traceability.

This approach empowers operators to:
• Reduce lead times and inventory costs
• Protect against part obsolescence
• Strengthen supply chain resilience
• Secure IP and design data through enterprise-grade encryption

With over 2 million parts assessed and thousands digitized and stored across our secure facilities in the UAE and Saudi Arabia, Immensa is shaping the future of spare parts management one digital asset at a time.

 Learn more at immensa.io

Name: Rock Flow Dynamics
Description:
New technologies developed by the research and product development teams of Rock Flow Dynamics are integrated into the company’s flagship product – tNavigator. This software is designed for running dynamic reservoir simulations on engineers’ laptops, servers, and HPC clusters. tNavigator is written in C++ and designed from the ground up to run parallel acceleration algorithms on multicore and manycore shared and distributed memory computing systems. The software employs Qt graphical libraries, which makes the system true multiplatform. By taking advantage of the latest computing technologies like NUMA, Hyperthreading, MPI/SMP hybrids, the performance of tNavigator by far exceeds the performance of any industry standard dynamic simulation tools. Only by using tNavigator can users be sure to unlock the full potential of modern computing hardware. 

Unlike other competing software products, tNavigator license pricing doesn’t depend on the number of cores employed in the shared memory computing systems.   

One of the other distinctive features, which sets tNavigator apart from any existing products, is the interactive user control of the simulation run. Users can not only monitor every step of the reservoir simulation at runtime, but also, they can directly interrupt and change the simulation's configurations with just a mouse click.

Name: CBM Soluciones Integrales SAC
Description:
CBM Soluciones Integrales S.A.C. es una empresa especializada en mantenimiento predictivo e ingeniería de confiabilidad, dedicada a maximizar la disponibilidad, seguridad y eficiencia de los activos industriales. Contamos con un equipo técnico altamente calificado y tecnología avanzada para el diagnóstico de maquinaria rotativa, equipos eléctricos y sistemas estáticos.

Nuestros servicios incluyen análisis de vibraciones, termografía infrarroja, ultrasonido aerotransportado, pruebas eléctricas, análisis de aceites, alineamiento láser, balanceo dinámico y metrología de precisión, orientados a detectar fallas incipientes y evitar paradas no programadas.

Aplicamos metodologías internacionales como ISO 17359, API 610 y Noria, integrando estrategias basadas en condición (CBM) y mantenimiento centrado en confiabilidad (RCM). Nuestra misión es brindar soluciones técnicas integrales que permitan a nuestros clientes reducir costos operativos, optimizar su mantenimiento y extender la vida útil de sus equipos críticos, garantizando la continuidad operativa bajo los más altos estándares de seguridad y calidad.

Name: Process Plant Computing Limited (PPCL)
Description:
We are the inventors, developers and supporters of Geometric Process Control technology and as very experienced chemical engineers have focussed on the operational problems of all types of process plants by process and control engineers. 
Our CVE product allows you to understand your entire operation, including across multiple units and in individual operating Modes, Phases and Grades by showing how 1,000 or more variables behave in one interrogative visualization of time-series data from process, laboratory, emissions and lagging KPI achievement by showing you the Operating Windows and Envelopes you are using today and those you should be using and where you should be placing Operator Alarm Limits.

The benefits of one over the other are usually easily extracted. 
Process control then has the role of keeping operation inside the chosen Operating Window or Envelope on all variables at all times so CVE in conjunction with our real-time CPM product work together to create a geometric model of an Operating Envelope complete with Operator display and OPC Client interfaces. No maths and no equations are needed, high-school maths is sufficient but what you will need is good knowledge of your process and its actual operating practices. You can use the CPM models with process history data for investigating past performance and seeing how the model would have coped with operating problems encountered in the past; you can use the model for Operator Training Simulators; you can use the model as a Digital Twin for a process operator giving open-loop operating guidance; and you can use the model to give very early notification of variables starting to diverge from their normal behavior relative to other variables which often detects plant problems long before a human would recognize a problem so giving the maintenance function time to schedule orderly intervention before equipment failure and avoiding an always-expensive plant shut-down.

Visit www.ppcl.com to find out more.

Name: Bluebonnet Materials and Specialty Sand
Description:
Bluebonnet Materials is a premier supplier of high-quality wet fracturing sand, serving the oil and gas industry with superior proppants designed for hydraulic fracturing operations. Specializing in the production of wet sand that meets the stringent performance demands of today’s energy sector, Bluebonnet Materials ensures the efficient extraction of oil and gas from unconventional reservoirs by providing reliable, durable proppants that maximize well productivity.

Our wet fracturing sand is sourced from high-purity, naturally occurring silica sand deposits, carefully processed to maintain uniformity in grain size and high crush resistance. With advanced processing techniques, Bluebonnet Materials provides sand that is ideal for both conventional and unconventional fracturing applications, offering enhanced conductivity and long-term well performance.

At Bluebonnet Materials, we prioritize quality control, ensuring that every batch of sand meets the rigorous standards set by the industry for both mechanical strength and chemical purity. Our products are designed to meet the specific needs of each hydraulic fracturing job, providing optimal flowback results and consistent performance across diverse geological formations.

With a focus on safety, efficiency, and environmental responsibility, Bluebonnet Materials offers a sustainable approach to sand production. We continuously invest in innovation and logistical capabilities to ensure that our customers receive the highest quality product on time and at competitive prices.

As a trusted partner in the energy sector, Bluebonnet Materials is committed to supporting the success of oil and gas operators with our exceptional wet fracturing sand, helping drive energy development with superior quality and performance.

Name: Pexgol
Description:
Pexgol, created by Golan Renewable Industries, is a global leader in the design and production of high-performance PE-Xa piping systems. With over 60 years of experience, we provide innovative, sustainable solutions for transporting hot, corrosive, and abrasive liquids in industrial, infrastructure, oil & gas, and mining sectors.

Our pipes are produced through a unique crosslinking process that forms an unbreakable molecular network, resulting in unparalleled durability, corrosion resistance, and temperature resilience. Pexgol systems are proven to outperform traditional materials such as HDPE, steel, and PVC, providing long-term reliability even in the most challenging environments.

Why Pexgol?
 Extreme Temperature Resistance: Withstands from -50°C to 110°C (-58°F to 230°F), suitable for diverse climates and demanding processes.
 Corrosion & Abrasion Resistance: Ideal for transporting aggressive chemicals, slurries, and abrasive materials, significantly reducing maintenance costs.
 Longevity & Sustainability: Pexgol pipes have been proven to last decades in harsh environments, minimizing replacements and reducing environmental impact.
 Quick & Cost-Effective Installation: Supplied in long lengths, reducing the need for joints and installation time while improving safety.

At Pexgol, we go beyond providing pipes. We deliver end-to-end solutions supported by a team of highly qualified engineers, offering project planning, field supervision, and technical support. From potable water networks to high-pressure oil & gas lines, our systems are built to optimize efficiency, reduce costs, and ensure sustainability.

With installations spanning over 40 countries, our legacy includes transformative projects in mining, industrial processes, and municipal infrastructures, consistently exceeding expectations in performance and reliability.

At Pexgol we lead the way in sustainable piping solutions for a resilient future. Learn more at pexgol.com

Description:
Superior Silica Sands is committed to providing best in class quality and service to the INDUSTRIAL SAND market in Texas.  The San Antonio plant, located just minutes south of San Antonio, TX offers a variety of products to the Construction, Sports, and Industrial markets.   Not only will you find our sand on many of the finest golf courses, equestrian, and volleyball courts in Texas, you can also find our products used in many of the construction projects around the state as well.  The dedicated Industrial plant can produce over 1 million tons per year to our customers.

When it comes to LOCAL FRAC SAND needs, Superior Silica Sands plant in the EAGLEFORD is second to none.  The San Antonio Frac Sand plant, located in the heart of the Eagle Ford shale, offers Superior Silica Sands a strategic edge on our competition with a capacity of 3 million tons per year of 40/70 & 100M frac sands.  The San Antonio plant is a best-in-class operation that produces high quality products our clients are accustomed to receiving.  The facility  boasts FIVE LOADOUT LANES – which is the most of any sand mine facility in the Eagleford.  The five  loadout lanes provides exceptional through-put capabilities that eliminates long truck lines and wait times.  The facility also has over 19,000 tons of dry silo storage and 200,000 tons of wet stockpile storage. Utilizing capabilities from our Industrial plant, we are also able to provide 20/40 and 30/50 mesh frac sands for the vertical sand fracturing market.

Name: PACE Geoscience
Description:
Integrated Geoscience and Structural Geology Solutions for Energy Industry and Scientific Research.

Specialized Geoscience and Structural Geology services for subsurface exploration and development of energy resources and characterization and modelling of the Earth’s subsurface for various geoscience applications:

 Characterization and analysis of surface and subsurface geological structures related to different tectonic regimes through integration of diverse datasets 

 Remote sensing and regional to outcrop-scale structural-geological mapping and related analytical methods

 Balanced cross-section construction and 2D/3D structural restoration and forward modelling 

 2D and 3D seismic structural and stratigraphic interpretation

 Seismic attributes for identification and extraction of sub-seismic discontinuities

 Well data interpretation, analysis and correlation for seismic interpretation and reservoir modelling

 Construction of robust 3D structural frameworks and development of advanced workflows in structural modelling, kinematic analysis and strain modelling 

 Play-based lead-to-prospect generation with resource and risk assessment

 Integrated multi-scale characterization of faults and fracture networks and building of multi-scenario discrete fracture network (DFN) models

 Building geologically reasonable and representative conceptual models 

 Development of static models for reservoir evaluation, exploration planning and trajectory determination for appraisal and development wells 

 Advisor and peer-review assistance in geoscience and structural geology, supporting data-rooms and A&D technical evaluations

Name: MGPALAEO
Description:
Welcome to MGPalaeo, integrated geological consultants servicing the Australasian resources sector since 1983.
With the headquarters in  Perth (Western Australia), two satellite offices in Adelaide (South Australia) and Brisbane (Queensland), and with a staff of seven fulltime palynologists and two sedimentologists, we are the largest stratigraphic consultancy in Australia.
MGPalaeo's integrated geological services are geared toward achieving quality-assured, maximum stratigraphic control. 
The MGPalaeo palynological zonation scheme is the Australian industry standard, built upon more than 40 years’ work to enable consistent and trusted correlations between wells. This zonation forms the basis to the AUSTRALIS geological database, the only fully reviewed and QC’d geological database of >3000 Australian and Timor-Leste wells.
With a specialized biostratigraphic laboratory on-site at our headquarters in Malaga (Western Australia), our dedicated and highly qualified staff aim to help you manage risk through providing high quality biostratigraphic precision and stratigraphic control for a range of industries, from oil & gas, mining & minerals, and carbon capture & storage, to groundwater, geothermal, archaeological, civil engineering, and more. We also work closely with universities across Australia, helping to train the next generation of palynologists.
MGPalaeo’s comprehensive range of sedimentological services are provided to attain a better understanding of stratigraphic development and depositional models. Our services include core descriptions, wireline log interpretation, image log interpretation, rock typing and more. To better understand the application and benefits of sedimentology and biostratigraphy, MGPalaeo run numerous integrated stratigraphic workshops and courses.
We can work with you, at your office or ours, to help develop/refine your project in the best way possible. Please contact us to discuss your requirements or ideas or visit www.mgpalaeo.com.au

Name: CONDIMONT
Description:
CONDIMONT company aims at providing the most valuable services in condition monitoring. With well experienced personnel we are honored to have particular experience in condition monitoring as below: 

-	Piping/flare systems
CONDIMONT  technology lets you ‘see inside’ piping and flare systems in real time. Fast, accurate and cost-effective, CONDIMONT technology helps to determine the flow of vapor, liquid carry-over, sludge build-up, and the amount of fouling materials in piping/flare systems.

-	Desalters
Our technology helps identify operational inefficiencies to improve Desalter performance.

-	Ammonia converters
Our online studies identify operational problems in ammonia converters.

-	Trayed towers
CONDIMONT technologies deliver actionable data to optimize trayed tower performance.

-	Tanks and spheres
CONDIMONT provides a clear picture of what’s happening inside tanks.

-	Reactors
CONDIMONT helps you improve the efficiency of reactors.

-	HF/SF alkylation
CONDIMONT provides a real-time picture of what’s happening in alkylation vessels.

-	Packed bed towers
CONDIMONT provide cost-effective methods to identify and understand issues within packed bed towers.

-	Heat exchangers
CONDIMONT technology takes you straight to leaks detected in heat exchangers whilst remaining online.

-	FCCU assets
CONDIMONT lets you see inside your FCCU and make critical operational decisions.

-	Separators
CONDIMONT technology gives you the inside information on separator vessels.

-	Asset integrity
CONDIMONT asset integrity services allow you to visualize the condition of subsea pipelines and platform structures.

-	Flow assurance
CONDIMONT flow assurance services allow you to locate stuck pigs and identify/characterize blockages in subsea pipelines.

Description:
Since 1997, Electrogas Monitors is an Alberta-based safety supply company servicing several industrial, commercial, and Governmental sectors within Western Canada. From the beginning, our main objective was to offer unparalleled customer service while providing one of the most diversified product portfolios in the industry.

Our humble beginnings started out as a small BW Technologies (now Honeywell) distributer with only a few staff members. It didn’t take long for those employees to build a reputation as the leader in sales and service for our customers’ gas detection needs. We quickly became one of the largest distributors for BW Technologies in Canada and our expertise was sought out from many across Western Canada. BW soon rewarded our growing reputation by certifying Electrogas Monitors as the world’s first Master Service Centre in January of 2010.

Since 2010, Electrogas has continued to diversify its portfolio by pairing with new and innovative manufacturers. In 2010, we paired with Dräger Safety and have become the largest distributor in Western Canada and the second-largest distributer in Canada. 

As we continue to add to our portfolio with industry-recognized leaders in safety products such as:

* Blackline Safety
* MSA Safety
* RKI Instruments
* RAE Systems by Honeywell
* Air Systems International
* RC Systems
* Jordair Compressors Inc
* Portagas

As this diversification occurred, we remain committed to providing the same outstanding customer service and support that our name has been synonymous with. Programs of continuing education and training of our service and sales staff are forever being utilized to ensure we find the right product for your specific safety needs. In addition, the industry’s FIRST and ONLY customer loyalty program offers specific, service-based incentives to our dedicated customers.

Name: Seismic Mechatronics BV
Description:
Seismic Mechatronics designs and builds electromagnetic seismic sources that produce high resolution images of the subsurface with e.g. a wide frequency range and very low distortion. For the last 60 years, hydraulic seismic vibrators have been used to produce those subsurface images. Seismic Mechatronics offers the next generation in vibroseis systems for seismic data acquisition.

Our electric vibrators or E-vibs have features that conventional hydraulic vibrators are unable to reach:

High quality broad bandwidth
Extremely low frequencies (e.g. full force from 2.5Hz)
Ultra low THD 
(non) linear and pseudo random signals
Easy transport and easy handling
Low transport costs, no permits or security clearances 
Highly repeatable
Very low noise (dB)

Another interesting feature of our E-vibs are the very low maintenance costs. Our vibroseis systems do not use any hydraulics. So no fluid spills. The electric vibrators are build based on a friction less design, minimizing costs and maximizing value.

Name: Ab Astra Inc.
Description:
At Ab Astra, we are revolutionizing exploration and structural monitoring through muography, an advanced technology that allows us to visualize the interior of structures and geological formations with unprecedented precision. Our cutting-edge solutions serve key industries such as Oil & Gas, Mining, Nuclear Energy, Precision Agriculture, Aquifers, Infrastructure, and Underground CO₂ Storage, providing critical insights for strategic decision-making.

Much like a CT scan for the earth, muography is a powerful, non-invasive exploration technology that provides high-precision imaging of underground structures. Our approach significantly reduces the need for extensive drilling, as we can deploy our sensors through existing boreholes, minimizing environmental impact and operational costs while maximizing efficiency.

With our LUMINA code, we integrate cutting-edge simulation technologies, grounded in relativistic quantum mechanics and data from the world’s leading particle accelerators, with AI-driven analytics to generate highly detailed 3D models of target objects. This approach enables near real-time insights into their internal composition and stability, empowering businesses to detect potential risks early, optimize project planning, and ensure the integrity of critical infrastructure with greater accuracy and confidence.

Our commitment to innovation drives us to develop state-of-the-art sensor technology, pushing the boundaries of precision and reliability in data acquisition. This continuous advancement ensures that our solutions remain at the cutting edge, offering unparalleled performance for a wide range of applications.

By merging advanced particle physics, AI, and high-fidelity simulations, we provide a transformative approach to subsurface exploration, enabling industries to make data-driven decisions with confidence and efficiency.

Reducing cost of critical mineral processing increases mineral abundance. It powers the next frontier. Advanced nuclear, space, AI need atoms, not just code. And today, engineers are held back by material scarcity. That needs to change.

We build autonomous, low-CAPEX, low-OPEX mineral processing systems. Radically simplified. Circular. Built for deployment at speed and scale.

Faster deployment. Domestic strength. A shift in the spectrum. That’s the BlueShift mission.

If you’re mission-driven and want to work on the front lines of industrial resilience, join us

Name: enviroMETS Qld
Description:
An independent, industry led NFP company focussed on finding new innovative and sustainable new ways of making mine impacted land more valuable to next custodians.

enviroMETS (Qld) Limited has been formed to expand upon the 'Tailings & Mine Affected Water" Cluster initiated through a collaborative partnership between METS Ignited and the Queensland Government in 2018. eMQ is now an independent, industry-led, not-for-profit company.


METS Ignited and the Queensland Government recognised many of Queensland’s operating mines have, or will have, reached the end of their productive life in the coming decades. As the 1200 or so abandoned mine sites attest, successful mine closure or economic post mining outcomes has traditionally been a challenge for industry. 


eMQ responds to the diverse range of challenges that may be overcome by adopting a successful collaborative approach to improve outcomes of mine affected land for industry, communities, and the environment.


It is enviroMETS mission to research and devise innovative, and sustainable repurposing, recommercialising, and remediation solutions to ensure the land is valuable and usable to future custodians.

Interested stakeholder groups representing; SME-Vendors; Academia & Researchers; Government & SOEs; Mining & METS Corporates; Capital Investors; and Communities. groups can participate in collaborative projects and events, commercial funding and support from a trusted independent broker.

enviroMETS will develop a matrix of trusted go-to expertise of skills and experience in; 
Mine Lifecycle Planning; 
Geochemical & Mine Affected Water; 
Mine 'Waste' Reprocessing, 
Geotechnical & Tailings Storage Facilities;
Mine Closure Management; and 
Governance/Policy/Regulatory Framework. 

A collaboration of these groups and expertise was designed to provide a conduit of innovative industry led solutions to government and mining companies.

Name: Extractive Insight
Description:
Extractive Insight is an Africa-focused research and data analytics consultancy serving the mining, energy and mineral value chain. We support companies, investors, financial institutions and governments with independent, decision-ready intelligence grounded in technical rigor and deep regional understanding.

Our work spans four core practice areas.

We deliver market and sector intelligence, providing commodity and country outlooks, critical minerals analysis, supply-chain mapping, pricing and cost-curve analysis, and policy and regulatory assessments to support strategic planning, investment decisions and policy formulation.

We provide project and asset intelligence, translating geological and technical data into commercial insight for investment, financing and transaction processes. This includes asset screening, comparative analysis, risk assessment, due diligence support and post-transaction performance monitoring.

We advise governments and institutions through policy, regulatory and institutional advisory, supporting the design and review of mining and energy policies, fiscal and revenue frameworks, licensing and governance systems, and market-facing strategies.

We also offer transaction and capital support, delivering research-driven analysis for pre-investment and credit decisions, data-room structuring, market intelligence for partnerships and offtake, and risk stress-testing during negotiations and execution.

Extractive Insight operates across East, Central, Southern and West Africa, with particular depth in key mining corridors. Our work is designed to support real-world decisions in complex and frontier resource markets.

Our company was established in 2008, covering an area of 30,000 square meters. We have numbers of invention patents and has obtained certificates such as ISO9001, ISO14001, CE, AAA, and we have been rated as a national high-tech enterprise.

Our main reciprocating pump products are designed according to relevant national standards and API674 and ISO13710 standards, and they can cover the flow and pressure requirements of various application fields, including fracturing pumps, water injection pumps, polymer injection pumps, carbon dioxide injection pumps, acidizing pumps, well cementing pumps, emulsion pumps, mud pumps and high-pressure cleaning pumps. They are widely used in oil field water injection, polymer injection, carbon dioxide injection, acidizing, fracturing, well cementing, pressure testing, coiled tubing, trenchless construction, mining, geological drilling, coal mine hydraulic fracturing, roadway support, sealing grouting, spray explosion protection, tunnel drilling, high-pressure industrial cleaning, and other related fields.

Our product series have plunger pumps and piston pumps. The power configurations include hydraulic motors, electric motors, and diesel engine drives, which can realize wireless remote control, unattended operation, cloud storing monitoring and alarm historical data and other functions. We use international advanced production technology, utilizes a high-quality R&D team, adopts new technologies, new materials, and new processes, and relies on advanced processing and testing equipment to produce products with compact structure, light weight, small size, and beautiful appearance reciprocating pump products that are easy to install and maintain. Name: LiTHOS
Description:
LiTHOS mission is to deliver sustainable lithium production without the use of evaporation ponds. We offer AcQUA, a patent-pending electro-pressure membrane process and method for recovery and concentration of lithium chloride from aqueous sources. This process spans the pre-treatment of raw brines through the DLE concentration of lithium chloride process. We have a fully commissioned brine processing facility in Denver, Colorado. LiTHOS is currently focused on processing continental brines from several strategic resource owners located in the United States, Argentina, and Chile.

AcQUA(TM) is a patent-pending technology for an electro-pressure membrane process and method for recovery and concentration of lithium chloride from aqueous sources. AcQUA(TM) is a unique modular technology that is capable of pre-treatment, selective purification, and concentration of lithium-enriched brines prior to extracting lithium chloride. The unique AcQUA(TM) technology avoids the typical challenges faced by chemically intensive DLE technologies currently in the development phase. AcQUA(TM) enables lithium brine resource operators to deploy economically viable and sustainable field-ready extraction solutions that will substantially reduce water consumption by recycling 98.5% of the input brine water and eliminating the use of evaporation ponds in the pre-treatment and concentration phases of production.

Name: LIAMforum
Description:
The LIAMforum seeks to engage and inspire the next generation. It provides a platform for young people who aspire to make the world a better place to relate to career & growth opportunities within the Sustainable Resource Development space.

The LIAMforum, to be hosted online at Brock University in Ontario, Canada, is a timely meeting space where thought-leaders and participants from across the globe, from academia, industry, think tanks, multi-lateral institutions & governments, will share their ideas, research findings & ideals. Many of the presenters are involved with key sustainability issues facing the world today, working to implement actionable, results-oriented solutions.

The Forum will also cover practical subjects related to identifying career opportunities, personal growth, finding mentors and champions, & networking.

The LIAMforum aims to help young people identify exciting growth & career paths as well as connect with the participants, fostering networking & mentoring opportunities

We aim to bring together thought leaders, young and old, from industry, academia & governments with the aim of:

* Inspiring & motivating young people to pursue careers in the resources sector, empowering them to get involved & help transform it
* Presenting cutting edge ideas on sustainability & resource development, & their implementation
* Showcasing initiatives and case studies from the mining, agriculture & energy sectors
* Examining how to teach, educate and effectively inspire & motivate about sustainable resource development, in academia and industry
* Covering practical subjects related to identifying career opportunities, personal growth, finding mentors & champions, and networking.
* The presenters at the Forum will aim to credibly show the next generation that the sector hears them, has their backs, and truly needs & wants them in the sector, as their enthusiasm, skills & knowledge will be instrumental in helping society attain the desired sustainability goals

Name: Continuous Control Solutions (now: Control-Care)
Description:
Control-Care (Systems) is an automation, process control and real-time optimization company. For over a decade, Control-Care (Systems) has offered a comprehensive range of services and products to the upstream, midstream and downstream sectors of the oil and gas, chemical, petrochemical, metallurgy and power generation industries worldwide. Our reach is truly global, with systems successfully installed throughout Europe, Asia, Africa, the Middle East and North and South America.

Our services include design, implementation and commissioning of reliable, high quality, state-of-the-art control systems for industrial turbo machinery and process applications. Our success stories cover the full spectrum from full lump sum turn key (LSTK) integrated plant control systems to modeling and simulation tasks only. Our proven knowledge and technical expertise allows us to provide you with design, implementation and support of projects of a great variety of control system vendors. 

Control-Care Systems’ strength is to design open systems using off-the-shelf products. We utilize primarily leading third-party programmable logic controller (PLC) hardware, humanmachine interface (HMI) and supervisory control and data
acquisition (SCADA) software. We are vendor independent, allowing you to select from a variety of quality products to produce a solution that offers the best price-performance combination for your particular application, providing excellent value. Visit us at www.ccsia.eu or www.control-care.com

Name: Petroleum Industry Productivity Research Center (PIPRC)
Description:
Petroleum has been the leading industry worldwide for more than 100 years. Any improvement in oil and gas production and consumption will have a significant effect on other industries and our lives at large. With the aim of improving quality and quantity within the Iranian petroleum industry, the Petroleum Industry Productivity Research Centre (PIPRC) has been established at the K.N. Toosi University of Technology (KNTU). KNTU is a leading university in industrial research and development. With more than 80 years of experience in engineering education, research and industrial connections, KNTU has established a close relationship with the petroleum industry.
Relying on extensive experience in the oil and gas industry, the PIPRC aims to further improve advanced applied research within KNTU and to extend the university’s role in the petroleum industry.
The following areas are within the interest of the PIPRC:
-- Examining the geoscience and geomatics of oil and gas reservoirs to improve oil processing
-- Considering the chemical properties of produced oil and gas to enhance
downstream processing
-- Implementing geomechanical modeling of oil and gas reservoirs
-- Conducting data mining and designing advanced control and automation
systems
-- Researching the environmental impact of the petroleum industry
-- Utilizing greener EOR/IOR technologies.
The PIPRC engages distinguished professors and researchers from various departments of KNTU, including geomatics and geoscience, civil engineering, mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, computer engineering, chemistry, mathematics, and physics.
Many renowned petroleum industry experts are adjunct members of the PIPRC, and close relations are maintained with both domestic and international companies in the petroleum industry. Consequently, the PIPRC has become a leading research center in the petroleum industry, with the capability of supplying advanced research and solutions.

Description:
At APM Alliance, we deliver comprehensive asset management services that optimize operations, reduce costs, and extend asset lifespans. Our high-level asset management audits assess your current practices against global standards like ISO 55000, identifying opportunities for improvement and forming the basis for a strategic asset management plan tailored to your business needs.

In reliability and maintenance engineering, we specialize in Reliability-Centered Maintenance (RCM) and Risk-Based Inspection (RBI). These methodologies focus on critical assets, ensuring maintenance is strategically targeted to enhance reliability and minimize downtime. We conduct RAM studies to model asset performance, identifying potential inefficiencies and optimizing asset utilization. Our digital twin simulations create virtual models of your assets, enabling proactive decision-making by predicting performance under various scenarios.

Our root cause analysis (RCA) delves into asset failures to identify and eliminate underlying issues, preventing recurrence and enhancing long-term reliability. Combined with our defect elimination processes, we ensure your assets operate at peak efficiency.

Leveraging AI and machine learning, we offer advanced failure prediction capabilities. These tools analyze operational data to anticipate potential failures, allowing for timely maintenance that reduces unexpected downtime and extends asset life. Our services also include CMMS implementation, streamlining maintenance operations by enhancing work order management, tracking, and spare parts availability, improving overall asset management efficiency.

We are committed to sustainability, offering environmental studies that integrate eco-friendly practices into asset management. This includes air quality management, resource conservation, and circular economy principles. We also provide training programs to ensure your team is equipped to manage assets effectively, fostering a culture of excellence.

Name: SEPARATIC
Description:
SEPARATIC, redefining gas separation, is a start-up company based at the University of Fribourg. We aim to develop ultrahigh permeance membranes for cheaper and faster separation of gases compared to the traditional approach. We are using porous graphene as a revolutionary material that can achieve up to a million times higher permeation rates compared to conventional technologies. We have 2 products in development:
SEPARATIC-H2: a membrane separation unit that is aimed at addressing the purge losses in PEM fuel cells by making them more efficient, safer, and more sustainable. 
SEPARATIC-CO2: a graphene membrane aimed at reducing the costs of carbon capture and separation significantly. It can reduce the operational costs 4-9x and capital investment costs 3-5x compared to traditional approaches such as amine scrubbing and polymeric membranes.

Our eventual goal is to develop mobile carbon capture systems directly from the air and install them in Swiss cities and companies.

Welcome to FIFOJobsAustralia – your go-to hub for everything Fly-In Fly-Out in Australia! Whether you’re just starting your search for FIFO jobs or you’re a seasoned traveller between mine sites and home, you’ll find practical insights, application tips and lived-experience stories right here.

What we’re all about:

FIFO Jobs & Applications – step-by-step guides on how to land your first (or next) FIFO role, from resume tips tailored to mine-site recruiters to interview prep for camps and contractors.

Industry News & Updates – stay in the loop on roster changes, salary ranges, safety standards and new project developments across WA, QLD, NT and beyond.

Lifestyle & Wellbeing – share advice on managing shift work, fly-home schedules, mental health support and community events that keep FIFO families connected.

Community Expertise – ask questions, swap stories and learn best practice from fellow FIFO workers, recruiters and industry insiders.

Why join us?

Build your network in the Australian FIFO sector

Optimise your applications with SEO-friendly keywords recruiters actually search for

Get honest, unfiltered advice on life on and off-site

Jump in, introduce yourself and let’s make your FIFO journey smoother, safer and more rewarding!

Name: PowerPulse Solutions
Description:
PowerPulse Solutions is a global technology company specialized in traceability for the mining and base metals industry. We help mining companies achieve complete visibility and compliance across their operations connecting data, systems, and sustainability goals through advanced automation and intelligent integration.

Our mission is to make Mining Traceability seamless, transparent, and future-ready. From ore extraction to refined metals, we enable miners to prove the origin, sustainability, and carbon impact of every material they produce. This includes supporting EV battery passport initiatives and helping clients meet international traceability and sustainability standards.

As pioneers in ecological automation, we combine process automation, ERP integration, and SAP technologies including SAP S/4HANA, SAP ECC, and SAP AMS, powered by SAP Extending AI. Our solutions transform mining operations into data-driven, compliant, and low-carbon enterprises.

With a multinational team based in Spain, Peru, Estonia, the Netherlands, India, and Ukraine, PowerPulse brings world-class expertise and a deep understanding of the mining ecosystem across Latin America and beyond.

At PowerPulse Solutions, we don’t just automate mining, we trace it, verify it, and make it sustainable.

Name: TELLUS ENERGY CO.

At Tellus Energy Company, we are an innovative energy company at the forefront of integrating technology solutions in the mining, oil, and gas industries across Africa. With a strong commitment to sustainable practices and cutting-edge advancements, we power the future of these sectors by harnessing the synergy between energy and technology.

Our mission is to revolutionize the mining, oil, and gas industries in Africa by leveraging advanced technologies to optimize operations, enhance efficiency, and reduce environmental impact. We specialize in providing comprehensive energy solutions that seamlessly integrate with technology-driven processes, unlocking new levels of productivity, safety, and sustainability.

Through our expertise in energy management, renewable energy integration, and digital transformation, we empower mining and oil and gas companies to achieve operational excellence. We implement smart grid solutions, IoT (Internet of Things) technologies, and data analytics to streamline processes, enable real-time monitoring, and enhance decision-making capabilities.

By fusing energy and technology, we bring forth a new era of innovation and efficiency in the extraction, processing, and distribution of natural resources. Our comprehensive suite of services includes energy audits, customized renewable energy solutions, energy optimization strategies, and intelligent automation solutions tailored to the unique needs of the mining and oil and gas sectors.

At Tellus Energy Company, we believe that the future of the mining, oil, and gas industries lies in sustainable practices and technological advancements. With our integrated energy and technology solutions, we help our clients reduce carbon footprints, minimize operational costs, and improve overall performance while ensuring responsible resource management.

Join us in shaping the future of energy and technology integration in the mining, oil, and gas sectors across Africa. Together, we can drive economy.

Name: BumaCon
Description:
BumaCon, a Level 1 B-BBEE contributor, is a specialist provider of engineered conveyor belt solutions serving the mining and industrial sectors. The company’s core business is the design, manufacture, supply, installation assistance, and maintenance of conveyor systems that ensure safe, efficient, and continuous material handling from pit to plant.

BumaCon offers a comprehensive range of conveyor belts and components, tailored to demanding applications such as underground haulage, inclined conveyors, overland systems, and crushing and screening plants. Solutions are engineered to match each client’s operating conditions, including high-tensile steel cord and fabric-reinforced belting with abrasion, impact, heat, oil, or fire-resistant covers where required.

Beyond products, BumaCon positions itself as a long-term reliability partner. Its field services include belt splicing, repairs, pulley lagging, inspections, and breakdown support aimed at reducing downtime and extending asset life. By combining technical expertise, quality materials, and responsive site service, BumaCon helps mining and industrial operators lower their total cost of ownership while improving safety and productivity.

Through this integrated offering of products and services, BumaCon’s core business is enabling continuous, trouble-free conveying that keeps its customers’ production moving.

Visit www.bumacon.com for more details.

Name: PT. Maxima Arta Prima
Description:
Maxima Arta Prima (“Maxima”) konsisten menjaga keseimbangan energi dengan berpartisipasi aktif mendukung ketersediaan sumber daya mineral di masa depan, melalui penyediaan HDPE Geomembrane Liner. 

Berita Negara RI no 569 tahun 2020 dan Peraturan Menteri LHK RI no 6 tahun 2021, mewajibkan pemakaian HDPE pada kolam pengendapan (“Heap Leach”) untuk meminimalisir efek limbah tambang (seperti Merkuri pada tambang emas) atau limbah B3 lain pada industri kelapa sawit atau tambang sektor lain.

Maxima berkontribusi mendukung program pemerintah sejak Jan 2015, dengan secara aktif mendistribusikan HDPE yang telah lulus uji ASTM D4976-PE225, GRI GM13, FDA 21 CFR 177.1520; yang merupakan persyaratan uji ketahanan yang ditetapkan pemerintah Jepang dan Indonesia. 

Geomembrane Liner yang didistribusikan Maxima, diproduksi dari “Premium-Grade Resin” dari Chevron Phillips sebagai produsen Polythylene peringkat tiga besar dunia. Menggunakan jenis resin yang lebih tebal dan kuat yang dikhususkan utk aplikasi Geomembrane. Memiliki karakteristik anti tembus dengan daya tahan superior, memiliki ketahanan terhadap daya tarik atau perenggangan, ketahanan terhadap tusukan, retakan akibat pengaruh lingkungan dan radiasi UV.

Mendukung proses transmisi air pada industri akuakultur dan pengolahan limbah (waste water management), dengan cara menyediakan pompa Submersible untuk kebutuhan Industri terkait (Pompa HCP Taiwan); sekaligus merupakan distributor resmi alat ukur kualitas air dari Xylem USA/YSI Singapore.

Berpengalaman mendukung industri Akuakultur dengan menjadi pelopor implementasi teknologi terbarukan dan IoT (Internet of Things) sejak tahun 1990, termasuk aktif mendukung program Petambak Digital 4.0 dan Program Ekonomi Biru dari Kementerian Kelautan & Perikanan.

Nos últimos 25 anos, a Geotek projetou e construiu as plataformas MSCL para serem sistemas automatizados, versáteis e móveis de testemunhos, capazes de capturar a  estratigrafia com multiparâmetros. Além de nossos recursos MSCL, a Geotek também desenvolveu um equipamento de raios-X com gabinete (XCT) capaz de adquirir radiografias 2D (imagens) de alta resolução (<100 mícrons) em qualquer ângulo e tomografia computadorizada (TC). Estamos fornecendo nossos equipamentos e serviços para a ciência e indústria em todo o mundo.

Uma equipe de profissionais talentosos que vão de Geocientistas, Engenheiros, Desenvolvedores de Software e Eletricistas da Geotek projetam, constroem e operam nossos instrumentos.

A Geotek oferece seus serviços tanto em sei laboratório especializado em registro de testemunhos em Daventry, Reino Unido, quanto em campo (offshore e onshore) através de laboratórios móveis no formato de  contêineres com temperatura controlada. Os serviços de registro de testemunhos no campo, oferecidos pela Geotek, permitem que nossos clientes recebam dados quase que em tempo real à medida que as amostras estão sendo coletadas.

Name: Epslog SA
Description:
At EPLSOG, we're leading the way in sustainable core analysis with our groundbreaking CoreDNA technology, a multi-sensor core scanner. Our mission is to redefine sustainability in the field of geology by minimizing core material destruction and preserving intact samples for future analysis.

With CoreDNA, we've brought core analysis into the 21st century, offering rapid and precise centimetric continuous core logs immediately after barrel opening. Our cutting-edge technology takes up minimal space, providing swift insights for rock characterization.

What sets EPLSOG apart is our ability to seamlessly integrate petrophysical, geological, mineralogical, sedimentological, and rock mechanical data. This integration allows us to derive data-driven, transdisciplinary lithofacies, serving as a compass for guiding sub-sampling efforts and ensuring efficient characterization of each distinct facies.

EPLSOG, empowered by CoreDNA, is at the forefront of responsible resource utilization, promoting a more sustainable approach to geological exploration and research. We are dedicated to shaping the future of sustainable core analysis and geological research.

If you're interested in learning more about our innovative technology and how it can benefit your projects, don't hesitate to reach out to us. Together, we can unlock the full potential of sustainable core analysis and make a positive impact on the world of geology. 

#Sustainability #GeologicalExploration #CoreAnalysis #Innovation #EPLSOG

Name: Escáner Láser 3D
Description:
Una empresa de ingeniería altamente especializada en la captura de datos de proyectos existentes o complejos. Se enfoca en áreas cruciales para la industria, utilizando una tecnología precisa y eficiente para optimizar el trabajo. 

Los servicios que se ofrecen son:

Ingeniería estructural: Diseño, análisis y evaluación de la estabilidad de estructuras. El uso del escáner láser 3D permite obtener un modelo preciso de la estructura existente, lo cual es vital para proyectos de reforzamiento, remodelación o evaluación de daños.

Ingeniería de tuberías (piping): Diseño y trazado de sistemas de tuberías. Con el escáner láser 3D, se puede capturar la configuración exacta de las tuberías en una planta industrial, lo que facilita la detección de interferencias y la planeación de modificaciones o ampliaciones.

Ingeniería de equipos: Ubicación y diseño de maquinaria y componentes. El escaneo 3D permite obtener modelos precisos de equipos existentes o planificar la instalación de nuevos, garantizando un ajuste perfecto en el espacio disponible.

Tecnología avanzada de Escáner Láser 3D
Esta tecnología es el pilar de la propuesta y permite:

Capturar la realidad: El escáner láser proyecta haces de luz sobre el entorno y mide la distancia para generar una "nube de puntos". Esta nube es una representación digital muy precisa de la geometría física de los objetos y espacios.

Reducir riesgos y costos: Al tener un modelo digital exacto de las condiciones existentes, se minimizan los errores de diseño, se evitan colisiones y se reducen los costosos rediseños durante la construcción.

Optimizar el tiempo: La captura de datos es mucho más rápida y completa que los métodos manuales tradicionales, acelerando el proceso de ingeniería y modelado.

Aplicación en la industria
Este tipo de servicios es fundamental en industrias como la petrolera, petroquímica, de generación de energía y manufactura, donde la precisión es crítica para el buen funcionamiento y seguridad de las instalaciones.

Avasthi & Associates, Inc. A&A has built its reputation by adhering to the most rigorous standards of honesty and integrity and delivering to its clients the highest quality of most innovative services with impartiality, fairness, objectivity, and equity. A&A looks at all aspects of an E&P asset (whether onshore, offshore, conventional, unconventional, new, or mature) from subsurface to well planning, from production prediction to facilities scenarios and economics. A&A adds value by helping the asset teams mitigate risks and improve production rates and reserves. A&A is an integrated team of seasoned energy consultants and most of them have spent their entire careers in the energy industry. A&A seasoned consultants include subject matter experts (SMEs) and other professionals with extensive experience in diverse set of disciplines, including, but not limited to, resource characterization and geomodeling, reservoir engineering and simulation, enhanced oil/ gas/ coalbed methane recovery (EOR/ EGR/ ECBM), development geology, geophysics and petrophysics, facilities engineering, and economics and risk analysis. 

With A&A Consulting Team’s extensive expertise and worldwide experience in the energy sector, A&A is open to explore opportunities to advise or partner with firms focusing on sustainable energy/ CCS/CCUS projects, leveraging its skills in energy resources development to contribute to cleaner energy solutions.

Name: Saskatchewan First Nations Natural Resource Centre of Excellence Inc.
Description:
On September 8, 2009, the Saskatchewan First Nations Natural Resource Centre of Excellence (Centre of Excellence) officially opened its doors. A creation of the Lands and Resources Commission of the Federation of Saskatchewan Indian Nations (FSIN), the Centre of Excellence is mandated to provide support and work with First Nation communities in creating opportunities for the innovative, sustainable and environmentally responsible development of the natural resources within their lands and Indigenous territories.

Many of our Elders across this province speak about the Treaty promises and the economic opportunities which were to rise from these promises.  With this in mind, the Centre of Excellence aims at working alongside and to support the First Nations communities in our province to enable them to take full advantage of opportunities in the Energy/Resource sector such as Oil & Gas and Mining (Uranium, Potash, Gold, Diamonds) and renewable sources of energy such as Wind and Solar Power.

The Centre of Excellence also works to support initiatives that engage more First Nations people in business, educational and employment programs aimed at the Energy/Resource Sector.  It is our hope that by developing meaningful and collaborative relationships among First Nations, Industry, Educational Institutions and all levels of government, that we can build a prosperous future through the sustainable development of First Nation communities.

Through small group conversations, live coaching, retreats, and workshops, we work on the stuff that actually moves the needle:

Exec Crue isn’t about performative leadership or motivational fluff.

Name: PGK
Description:
The PGK is the professional network for geoscientists and geophysicists (G&G in the widest possible sense) who are professionally involved in Geo-Energy (and storage) in the Netherlands.

The PGK was established in 1978 as a subsidiary of the Royal Netherlands Geological and Mining Society (KNGMG) and has its seat in The Hague (The Netherlands). Its 250-300 active members work in (or have retired from), a.o., the petroleum industry, geothermal energy sector, subsurface storage, and academia. The PGK aims to connect members through its network, to facilitate knowledge sharing, and to stimulate collaboration. The society has a wide audience with an open and friendly character and members are encouraged to bring a guest along.

PGK members meet every third Wednesday of the month for a lecture and social, covering a broad range of technical, economical, and social topics. Meetings are normally held in The Hague and include an AGM in February, a barbecue in June (jointly organised with the SPE Netherlands section), and a Christmas dinner in December. Other than that, the PGK organises three excursions annually: a day trip, a multi-day excursion, and a long excursion. Recent destinations include the Omani Mountains, Albania, SW Ireland and Sicilia. The PGK is also including a Young Professionals (YP) section which will be focused on organizing regular events for early-career workers and students, including introductions at Dutch geo-universities and a YP excursion.

Members are welcome at all our events, receive a monthly newsletter, and have access to supplementary material (including past presentations) through this website. The annual membership fee is 25 EUR (a 10 EUR discount applies for students). Join us by registering through our website: pgknet.nl/membership

Petroend cuenta con un equipo de expertos en ensayos no destructivos altamente capacitados y certificados que utilizan equipos de ultrasonido phased array de última generación. Estos equipos permiten realizar inspecciones rápidas y precisas, proporcionando resultados confiables y detallados.

La empresa se enorgullece de ofrecer servicios de inspección de alta calidad, brindando soluciones a medida para cada aplicación y necesidad específica del cliente. Su objetivo es garantizar la seguridad y confiabilidad de las instalaciones y equipos en la industria petrolera, minimizando los riesgos y maximizando la eficiencia operativa.

Name: IPI Packers
Description:
IPI Packers is an independently owned designer, manufacturer, and supplier of inflatable packers and associated equipment. Founded in 1999 in Perth, WA, we have grown into a renowned player serving the Oil & Gas, Mining, Groundwater, Geotechnical, Geothermal, and Construction industries. Our independently owned status allows us to be nimble, offering standard and custom-made inflates for every stage of an asset’s lifecycle - from exploration to plug & abandonment.

What sets IPI Packers apart is our proprietary contra-wound element design, often incorporating DuraGrip anchoring. Our state-of-the-art technology delivers exceptional robustness, recoverability, reliability, and bidirectional sealing, while allowing best-in-industry operational envelopes up to 15,000 psi, over 150 inflation cycles, and successful retrieval.

Our dedication to quality, safety, and environmental stewardship is backed by triple ISO certifications (ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001) at both of our manufacturing centers in Australia and Europe. This ensures that each packer meets the highest standards and performs in even the most demanding conditions.

The year 2024 marked our 25th anniversary as we evolved from a single-person venture into a global team of over a hundred, with offices in the Middle East, Australia, North America, South America, and worldwide agents. IPI has shipped to every continent – including Antarctica! Our extensive reach ensures timely support and local expertise wherever our clients operate.

We prioritize collaboration with our customers, providing training, service, and technical guidance to ensure their success. Guided by core values of Integrity, Innovation, Quality, Passion, and Teamwork, we commit to delivering solutions for your downhole needs.

At IPI Packers, we’re not just supplying tools; we’re partnering with you to shape a more reliable, efficient, and sustainable future.

Name: QuantumPro, Inc.
Description:
QuantumPro, Inc. is an oilfield technology company that offers revolutionary ultrahigh-resolution nanoparticle tracers for multistage hydraulic fracturing stimulation and injection operations in the exploration and production (E&P) and geothermal industries.

The company is successfully deploying the next generation of FloTrac, OmniTrac, PerfTrac, SoluTrac, and FloTracG tracers coupled with advanced sub-atomic measurements that significantly reduce the completion cost and increase the efficiency of the hydraulic fracturing operations.

An automated process with stringent quality control assures precise tracer addition and provides accurate and actionable completion diagnostics results at a fraction of the cost for high-cost measurements (e.g., PLT, DTS & DAS). 

Our proprietary FloTrac, OmniTrac, PerfTrac, SoluTrac, and FloTracG tracer technologies enables our clients to increase recovery factors by validating reservoir development strategies, geological and geomechanical models, and improve completion and multistage hydraulic fracture stimulation design.

Name: Geoactive Limited
Description:
Geoactive Limited is made up of an expert team of scientists, developers and all-round exceptional human beings that design, develop and produce high-quality digital products for use in the exploration and monitoring of subsurface geological terrain. Geoactive was established in 2022, however our software applications, which are built on a breadth of experience across each facet of the energy industry, have been at the top of their game for nearly 25 years. Every day, we apply our independent expertise to help our clients increase performance from their upstream and downstream operations and assets. We’re constantly developing and innovating to deliver solutions to the most complex challenges across the lifecycle of any asset. While our products have primarily been used within the Oil & Gas industry, they are also used in other sectors such as mining, geothermal and carbon capture. Our flagship products include Interactive Petrophysics (IP) and Interactive Correlations (IC).

Interactive Petrophysics (IP)
IP is our modular formation evaluation suite. From porosity and pore pressure to reservoir productivity, IP gives you an incredibly capable and customisable solution to share and interpret well logs and many other vital data types.

Interactive Correlations (IC)
IC is our geoscience software application that helps you achieve effective communication and collaboration across multiple disciplines quickly. It enables you to efficiently pull information from an assortment of data and produce powerful reviews quickly. Run your log and zonal analysis quickly and visualize your findings alongside a plethora of measured data to confirm your observations and findings directly from the borehole. Map out and build succinct results together to provide a clear understanding and lead to confident decisions that will improve efficiency, reduce costs and build a strong and reliable reputation.

Check out geoactive.com to find out more.

Name: SeisPetro
Description:
SeisPetro is a consulting, software, and training company focused on petrophysical modeling, seismic constrained geological modeling and characterization of conventional and unconventional reservoirs.  Our philosophy strives in the understanding of fundamental principles to create solutions that can be used in reservoir management and exploration decisions, focusing on the solution and not the technique. 

Tailoring petrophysics and seismic to specific needs, many times require tools which are not commercially available.  Therefore, SeisPetro has developed, and continues to develop, specialized software that complement the work that can be performed with commercial platforms.  

We are the developers of iMineralysis, a multimineral analysis tool that uses artificial intelligence to estimate mineral and fluid compositions in the most complex geological settings of rock and fluid properties.  iMineralysis adaptively tests hundreds of combinations of coefficients within the specified ranges by using a genetic algorithm-based optimization.  Basically, it performs the multimineral analysis for hundreds of possible cases in seconds! The increased speed allows exploring spatial variations in water resistivity, kerogen maturity, and clay composition and perform multimineral analysis in hundreds of wells in a short period of time. 

SeisPetro was founded by Dr. Reinaldo Michelena to continue the advancement of the reservoir characterization technologies he's been developing and applying during his career for more than 35 years.

For more information about consulting services, iMineralysis software, and training, go to www.seispetro.com.

Name: Sarulla Operations Ltd
Description:
Sarulla Operations Ltd (SOL) is sponsored by a consortium of Medco, Itochu, Kyushu, Inpex and Ormat. The total investment of the project is USD 1.7 billion. The second amendment of the ESC (Energy Sales Contract) and JOC (Joint Operation Contract) between SOL, PLN and PGE was signed on April 4 2013. SOL has built the world's largest Geothermal Power Plant in a single contract, with a capacity of 3 x 110 MW to contribute the electricity needs in North Sumatra.

The Sarulla project is located in Pahae Julu and Pahae Jae Districts, North Tapanuli Regency, North Sumatra Province. The first unit was operated commercially in March 2017, the second unit was operated in October 2017 and the third unit was started to operate in May 2018.

The geothermal power plants are fueled by steam and brine from production and injection facilities at Silangkitang and Namora-I-Langit reservoirs. The power plants utilize geothermal combined cycle units which are more efficient than conventional flash type geothermal power plants. The plants capture the steam and brine from the wells and produce energy throughout the day which are intended for base load operation. The condensate steam and the brine water are re-injected to underground via wells to maintain sustainable geothermal resources.

Name: AFRICAN ENERGY & ECONOMIC YOUTH COUNCIL
Description:
The African Energy and Economic Youth Council (AEEYC) is dedicated to driving Africa's energy and economic agenda towards sustainable development. With a mandate that recognizes the importance of hydrocarbons in electrifying Africa, AEEYC also champions the integration of renewable clean technologies and energies into the continent's energy mix. Recognizing the urgent need for a diversified energy portfolio, AEEYC advocates for the adoption of renewable energy sources such as solar, wind, and hydrogen, alongside traditional hydrocarbons, to ensure energy security and mitigate climate change impacts.

Moreover, AEEYC acknowledges the critical role of minerals in facilitating the transition to a more sustainable energy future. As Africa possesses vast reserves of critical minerals essential for renewable energy technologies, such as lithium, cobalt, and rare earth elements, the council advocates for responsible extraction and utilization of these resources to support the continent's energy transition. By leveraging instruments like the African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA), AEEYC seeks to foster collaboration among African nations to develop value chains for critical minerals, ensuring equitable distribution of benefits and promoting sustainable development across the continent.

In addition to its focus on energy and minerals, AEEYC recognizes the interconnectedness of various economic sectors in driving Africa's development agenda. Through advocacy and policy engagement, the council seeks to promote investment and innovation across key sectors fostering economic growth and job creation for Africa's youth.

As a leading voice for African youth in energy and economic matters, AEEYC is committed to leveraging partnerships, fostering innovation, and advocating for policies that prioritize sustainable development and inclusive growth.

PT Geo Sinergi Utama, through its brand GeoSynergy Solution, is a Jakarta-based engineering and consulting company specializing in geotechnical, hydrogeological, environmental services, and geotechnical instrumentation. Since 2013, we have supported projects across Indonesia and overseas with reliable and integrated technical solutions.

We provide end-to-end services, including site investigation, geological mapping, engineering analysis and design, foundation and slope engineering, environmental and hydrology studies, and comprehensive QA/QC and engineering review for onshore, offshore, and nearshore developments.

With international experience in Indonesia, Southeast Asia, Australia, and the Middle East, our team is skilled in handling complex geological conditions—from hard rock environments and nickel laterite terrains to tropical soils and shallow marine sediments. We serve key sectors such as mining, construction, infrastructure, oil & gas, water resources, and waste management, supported by groundwater monitoring, tailings review, and drilling services.

Our in-house geotechnical laboratory is equipped with ASTM and SNI-standard testing capabilities, operating under strict quality management and currently progressing toward KAN ISO 17025:2017 accreditation. Our ISO 9001:2015 certifications from UKAS and KAN further strengthen our commitment to delivering professional, consistent, and internationally aligned services.

Driven by integrity, professionalism, and technical accuracy, PT Geo Sinergi Utama is a trusted strategic partner for delivering safe, efficient, and high-quality engineering solutions.

Name: REELSAFE Safety & Compliance

Our unique custom-made equipment and methodologies have an extremely low impact on the environment, whilst maintaining personnel safety, lower costs and data integrity. We utilise high energy, highly mobile energy sources and high tech, light-weight geophysical receivers. 

Specialised services include:

1. SURVEY DESIGN:
- Optimised for greater subsurface imaging
- Specialists in challenging access environments
- Tailored to source and receiver technology
 
2. ACQUISITION:
- Reduced crew sizes, supported by technology
- Scalable source options
- Reduced HSE exposure
- Fast and low-cost mobilisation
- Little to no line clearing
- Field acquisition of active, passive and borehole seismic

2. PROCESSING
- Expert workflow design and strategy development
- Tailored to source and receiver technology
- Infield and centre-based processing
- Third party processing QC
- Specialist velocity modelling
- Fast turnaround options available on all projects

4. INTERPRETATION
- Regional and development seismic interpretation
- Quantitative and qualitative interpretation including advanced seismic attribute analysis and reservoir characterisation
- Velocity modelling and depth conversion
- Fault modelling
- Resource estimation
- Hazard analysis

To find out more about how Oceania Geo Seismic can assist with your project, contact Brendon Mitchell on 0473 631 856 or email bmitchell@oceaniageo.com.

Name: RECON Intelligence
Description:
RECON offers elegant products and comprehensive solutions for downhole drilling dynamics data recording, analysis and reporting. From automated report generation on the rig site, to in-depth bespoke analysis to future AI integration, RECON has the products and expertise.
 

THE RAW DATA YOU NEED
The RECON product line addresses a very important need in the oil and gas industry by providing the raw data required for Big Data Analysis with expertise to implement procedures and algorithms to effectively use the data. This improves overall efficiency and optimizes drilling operations.

TRACK FOR PREVENTATIVE MAINTENANCE
The downhole industry is traditionally very poor at administering preventative maintenance to its products due to the highly variable downhole environments and the varying operational practices between customers. As such, RECON devices provide accurate data on all runs, so it is possible to pre-emptively repair or remove equipment from service to avoid a failure. 

EFFECTIVELY TRACK & CHARGE BACK
Revenues collected for rental equipment are typically done using the honour system where financial collections based on usage are reported by the customer to the vendor, and the customer pays the amount for which the tool was used. The RECON products record usage time and thus provides checks and balances to ensure customers report honest and appropriate tool usage. 

CRITICAL DATA FOR R&D VALIDATION
New oilfield equipment is constantly being designed or improved; however, for most downhole systems, there are no resources available to collect high-resolution downhole data for product development and R&D purposes. You can use RECON products to validate new technology, as our products provide critical data for analysis on test runs.

Name: PetroSolutions
Description:
Overview

PetroSolutions is a company specialized in geological and petrophysical reservoir characterization, combining Geoscience, Technology, and Artificial Intelligence to deliver fast, integrated, and highly accurate insights for the oil and gas industry.

Our mission is to reduce uncertainties and accelerate strategic decisions, transforming geological, petrophysical, and laboratory data into predictive and actionable models that enhance operational efficiency and investment performance.

What We Do

We integrate Petrography, Petrophysics, Sedimentology, Geochemistry, and AI to understand the factors that control reservoir quality and distribution.
Through advanced data integration methods (RCAL, SCAL, well logs, and seismic) combined with machine learning, we identify patterns, classify Rock Types, and map zones of permeability, barriers, and diagenetic conduits — even in areas with limited data.

Key Differentiators

Full integration of rock, well, and laboratory data;

Artificial Intelligence and Deep Learning applied at every stage of the workflow (soon);

High-resolution 3D geological models derived directly from rock data (soon)

Fast, traceable deliverables ready for reservoir modeling;

Scientific consulting focused on efficiency, predictability, and strategic value.

We’re also aware of the impact that injuries from plant equipment, falls, slips and trips can have on a site’s productivity and bottom line. Our Stop DropTM conveyor guardingTM safeguards machinery and maintenance personnel on mechanised systems, while our Stop DropTM drop mattingTM prevents slips and protects flooring and walkways from damage caused by dropped objects.
BLH Safety Solutions. Think Safe. Be Safe.

Name: TEECsolutions
Description:
Founded in 1992 TEEC is a seismic data processing and reservoir characterization company with a strong emphasis on in-house research and development to deliver tailor-made solutions to our clients. During our more than 25 years of industry experience we have been working for in excess than 100 different clients: major to small oil companies, national oil companies, independent exploration companies as well as small consultancy firms and clients from geothermal energy companies. We have successfully delivered exceptional results to our customers in more than 750 different projects worldwide.

We strongly believe that each seismic dataset holds information that is still to be revealed. Conventional processing techniques and software solution often fall short in extracting all information from your expensive seismic data. TEEC provides advanced processing and software solutions that help you get the most out of your data.

TEEC offers seismic processing and reservoir characterization services as well as dedicated geophysical research and software development. We were the first seismic contractor who picked up on CRS processing back in the year 2000 and have been providing this exceptional breakthrough technology ever since. The R&D work is focused on high-end seismic processing tools such as CRS, advanced denoising and demultiple techniques, RTM, FWI and diffraction imaging. Our clients are companies related to the oil and gas or mining industry, the geothermal industry and engineering geology firms.

Name: Noble Helium
Description:
Primary helium for a high-tech world.

Noble Helium is answering the world’s growing need for a primary and geo-politically independent source of helium. Located along Tanzania’s East African Rift System, the Company’s four projects are being advanced according to the highest ESG benchmarks to serve the increasing supply chain fragility and supply-demand imbalance for this scarce, tech-critical and high-value industrial gas.

Our flagship North Rukwa Project has an independently certified, summed unrisked mean Prospective Helium Resource of 176 billion cubic feet (equivalent to approximately 30 years’ supply). The project lies within the Rukwa Basin, which has the potential to be the world’s third largest helium reserve behind USA and Qatar.

Priced at up to 50 times the price of LNG in liquid form, helium is now essential to many modern applications as an irreplaceable element in vital hi-tech products such as computer and smartphone components, MRI systems, medical treatments, superconducting magnets, fibre optic cables, microscopes, particle accelerators, and space rocket launches – NASA is a major consumer. Rising demand and constrained supply are fuelling growth prospects within the global marketplace, particularly for cleaner “green helium” sourced from non-carbon environments. At present, more than 95% of the world’s helium is produced as a by-product of the processing of hydrocarbon-bearing gas.

Name: OMAN QUALITY CONFERENCE
Description:
To survive and thrive. Managing quality effectively can enhance your organisation’s brand and reputation, protect it against risks, increase its efficiency, boost its profits and position it to keep on growing. 
Quality is not just a box to be ticked or something you pay lip service to. Failures resulting from poor governance, ineffective assurance and resistance to change can, and do, have dire consequences for businesses, individuals and society as a whole. Quality isn’t just an issue for commercial enterprises. Every organisation has stakeholders of one kind or another whose needs they must strive to meet, which is what effective quality management is ultimately about.

Quality management is about making organisations perform for their stakeholders – from improving products levels, services, standard systems and processes, to making sure that the whole organisation is fit and effective with a clean work culture. By stakeholders, we mean anyone who has an interest in the success of what your organisation does. 

Customers will be the most important group of stakeholders for the majority of businesses, but investors, employees, suppliers and members of our wider society are stakeholders too. Delivering an acceptable level of quality in your organization means knowing who your stakeholders are, understanding what their needs are and meeting those needs (or even better, exceeding expectations), both now and in the future.

Everyone from the CEO to the intern is responsible for the quality of what they do. Different people will have responsibility or influence over different things that affect the quality of an organisation’s outputs, such as specifying requirements, meeting those requirements or determining the quality of something.
