Name: Invasor Drilling Services
Description:
Invasor Drilling Services es un proveedor líder de gestión de proyectos y consultoría para la industria del petróleo y el gas convencionales, no convencionales y presta servicios en proyectos de perforación, geotermia y minería. 

Nuestra misión es ayudar a los clientes a lograr operaciones seguras, eficientes y que cumplan con las normas a través de experiencia, aseguramiento de calidad y soporte de seguridad.

Brindamos una gestión integral de proyectos, incluidos supervisores de perforación y terminación experimentados, que garantizan que los proyectos se mantengan encaminados y cumplan con los más altos estándares. Nuestro equipo trabaja en estrecha colaboración con los clientes para optimizar el rendimiento y reducir los riesgos, utilizando las mejores prácticas para manejar desafíos complejos en las operaciones de perforación y terminación.

La seguridad es una prioridad absoluta en Invasor. Implementamos y mejoramos continuamente protocolos de Salud, Seguridad y Medio Ambiente (HSE) en sitio, enfocándonos en el control de pozos y la gestión de riesgos. Nuestro personal está capacitado de acuerdo con los últimos estándares del Instituto Americano del Petróleo (API), lo que garantiza prácticas de seguridad sólidas que protegen tanto a las personas como al medio ambiente.

Nuestros servicios de garantía de calidad (QA/QC) incluyen auditorías rigurosas de equipos de perforación y reparación, asegurando que el equipo cumpla con todos los estándares regulatorios. Realizamos evaluaciones de puesta en servicio para verificar que los equipos estén en pleno funcionamiento, especialmente para campañas de pozos no convencionales. Al auditar los programas de repuestos y los sistemas de gestión de calidad, ayudamos a los clientes a evitar interrupciones y mantener operaciones consistentes.

Invasor también se especializa en pruebas de equipos de control de pozos, siguiendo las normas API Std 53.

Name: Integrity Engineering Solutions
Description:
Integrity Engineering Solutions (IES) is an internationally renowned niche engineering consulting firm specializing in Asset Integrity Management of mechanical fixed equipment in the Renewables, Refining, Oil & Gas, Petrochemical and Mining Industries. The company was established in 2010 and is headquartered in Dunsborough, Western Australia.

The focus of the company is on providing Asset Integrity Management consulting services for projects and plant maintenance. The work performed includes Fitness-For-Service (FFS) assessments of damaged equipment, advanced Finite Element Analysis (FEA) for both design and existing equipment, Pressure Vessel and Piping Bolted Joint Analysis and Failure Analysis, Materials, Welding, Corrosion, Risk-Based Inspection and Fixed Equipment Management. The company also develops and markets analysis software for pressure boundary bolted joints, provides maintenance and purchasing specifications for mechanical fixed equipment, conducts world-leading research into mechanical fixed equipment integrity and provides training in the design, maintenance and assembly of pressure boundary bolted joints.

IES clients include most major multi-national Oil & Gas and Refining organizations, with work blend of approximately 50% local and 50% overseas. We also provide high-end consulting to some of the major EPCM contractors and equipment suppliers in the industry.

Name: Stockholm Precision Tools AB (SPT)
Description:
Stockholm Precision Tools (SPT) has a reputation for providing state-of-the-art True North Seeking Gyros Systems for around 30 years.

Their products are widely used in the global oil and gas, mining, and civil engineering sectors, where downhole conditions are often challenging and harsh.

SPT's Gyro tools are known for their pinpoint accuracy on measurements and their ability to perform optimally even in the presence of heavy downhole magnetic interference.

SPT's Gyro tools offer numerous benefits to their partners, including reduced costs, increased safety, enhanced Rate of Penetration (ROP), reduced survey times, and absolute confidence in the accuracy of wellbore survey measurements.

In today's competitive market, wellbore accuracy has become vital to drilling teams, service companies, and field operators.

Any deviation or slight variation in wellbore placement can result in costly downtime, well damage, and loss of revenue for asset owners.

SPT's North Seeking Gyro System is specifically designed to function at full capacity even in the harshest high-temperature wells.

This advanced technology ensures that drilling teams and asset owners can have the confidence of knowing precisely where their hole is placed, regardless of downhole conditions and magnetic interference.

Pin-point well placement is essential for environmental and operational safety and key in terms of financial returns for asset owners.

Name: Namibia Youth Energy Forum
Description:
The Namibia Youth Energy Forum (NYEF) stands as the premier platform for young Namibians in the energy sector, encompassing Oil & Gas, Hydrogen, and Renewable Energy. Established by Namibian youth, NYEF is committed to engaging and empowering the next generation to actively participate in and shape the country's energy landscape.

Mission: NYEF's mission is to educate, inspire, and create opportunities for youth in the energy sector. We offer a comprehensive program that includes educational resources, workshops, and discussions designed to deepen young people's understanding of the energy industry.

Inspiration and Mentorship: We showcase success stories, provide mentorship programs, and facilitate interactions with industry leaders to inspire and guide our youth. NYEF fosters networking opportunities through summits, conferences, and online platforms, connecting young people with key stakeholders and promoting collaborative ventures.

Opportunities and Support: NYEF creates tangible opportunities for youth engagement by offering scholarships, internships, and work opportunities with industry organizations and government agencies. We also support young entrepreneurs in the energy sector with business assistance and funding.

Through our multifaceted approach, NYEF empowers young Namibians to become leaders and change-makers, driving the future of Namibia's energy sector. Join us as we build a sustainable and innovative energy future together. Founded in 2024, NYEF is fully endorsed by NAMCOR Namibia, with TotalEnergies Namibia as our Energizing Partner.

Description:
Marriott Drilling Group is the UK’s only remaining truly independent land Drilling Specialist, trusted for over 75 years to deliver safe, efficient and technically robust drilling solutions across geothermal, oil & gas, water-well, mining and energy-transition projects.

Our reputation is built on operational excellence, low non-productive time performance, and the quality of our people. We retain long-standing, highly competent crews and operate under ISO-accredited management systems, supported by in-house engineering, manufacturing, and project management capability.

We work across the UK, Europe, Africa, Asia and Central & South America, with an increasing focus on geothermal and clean-energy applications, partnering with governments, utilities and developers to accelerate sustainable energy supply and responsible natural-resource development.

As a family-run organisation, Marriott Drilling remains committed to integrity, safety and local employment, delivering value for our clients and positively contributing to the communities in which we operate.

Name: GulfTek
Description:
At GulfTek we go the extra mile to understand customer needs and come up with innovative solutions.

We are dedicated to deliver reliable engineered products and services as required by our highly respected customers when they need it and with the best in class quality. 

In order to deliver world class products locally GulfTek has invested in a state of the art manufacturing facility which has 6 API manufacturing licenses to manufacture pressure control, OCTG and downhole equipment.

We are proud of our highly experienced engineering and R&D team with capability to design and manufacture API and DNV certified products including, Valves, flow lines, manifolds, offshore baskets and skids as well as deliver excellent engineering services including recertification, rental, static and rotating equipment services.

GulfTek has developed technology partnerships with Global leaders in order to manufacture flowmeters, instrumentation fittings, and provide world class services locally in the Middle East. 

Our IKTVA score is the highest amongst our peers in country, and we continue to invest and train our local workforce.

Name: Equans Offshore Services
Description:
Equans Offshore Services is an organization which is active in the up- mid- en downstream olil and gas industry and sustainable renewable energy markets. Our integrated co-operation gives access to unlimited possibilities and facilities. 

Equans Offshore Services is the largest independent multidisciplinary service provider in the oil and gas – and wind industry. Our activities are carried out prevailing on offshore locations but also on onshore locations. Our activities vary from execution from upgrades, modification and maintenance to the removal of offshore installations. We do this with more than 250 employees. Our head office states in Den Helder right next to Den Helder airport. 

Equans invests continuously in the development of her products and services. With the maintenance, (partially) extension and renewal of production platforms, Equans Offshore Services plays an important role as well. Especially since the reserves become scarce, technical top notch performances is required to remain a profitable exploitation process. For more than 30 years, Equans Offshore Services is used to deliver this technical top notch performance.

Name: PDi Ltd
Description:
Project Development International Limited (PDi) is a highly skilled and experienced consultancy providing project management and discipline engineering solutions to the global energy sector from concept to decommissioning.

Established in 2003, PDi employs more than 90 multi-disciplined personnel, providing the highest quality project management, project engineering, discipline engineering and support services throughout the life cycle of oil and gas infrastructure.

More than 1000 projects, have been successfully delivered by PDi, addressing challenges ranging from brownfield development of mature assets in the North Sea to installation of subsea infrastructure offshore Brazil and decommissioning of gas platforms in India.

PDi has been part of the Tattva Group since January 2016 and building upon a successful track record continues to grow into new regions.

With more than 20 offices and warehouses accessible across the country, SEFAS continues to thrive and expand its reliable services and distribution network to provide solutions and deliver value to our customers and partners.

Name: LUBE-IT
Description:
Generation Systems Incorporated was founded in 1984 to provide custom software and database solutions for Fortune 1000 manufacturing and production sites in the Pacific Northwest. Early on the firm teamed up with a leading computerized maintenance management system (CMMS) developer to provide customized software and database solutions.
 
Through our daily interaction working with maintenance and reliability professionals GSI management recognized a customer need for software to effectively manage the unique and task-intensive maintenance discipline called 'machine lubrication', which led to the development of GSI's award winning LUBE-IT software.
 
GSI was purchased by AMRRI, a leading maintenance management consultancy in the field of machine lubrication, in 2019.  Drawing from 150+ years of combined knowledge within AMRRI, the LUBE-IT feature set has expanded to increase function and effectiveness in multiple ways, with the next steps being enterprise platform release and localization capability.  
 
As the world-wide leader in Lubrication Management software solutions, LUBE-IT provides capabilities far exceeding conventional CMMS software for lubrication route management, tracking and reporting. LUBE-IT is used around the globe by industrial organizations such as Cargill, DuPont, Rock-Tenn, Rio Tinto, Lafarge Holcim, Ingredion, Georgia Pacific, Continental Tire
and many more.
 
The future is Bright, and getting Brighter with LUBE-IT! Come take a look at the future of lubrication program management.

Name: AFRICA EXTRACTIVE PARTNERS
Description: In the heart of Africa’s vibrant landscape, a transformative initiative is taking root—Africa Extractive Partners (AEP). AEP is dedicated to addressing the unique challenges faced by the extractive industries across the continent. With a mission to promote African talent and enhance human capital, AEP’scommitment to promoting African skills and gender makes it a key player in sustainable development in Africa. Encouraging gender diversity: The company is firmly committed to promoting female talent, recognizing that the inclusion of women in the extractive industries is essential for balanced and sustainable development.

Name: Indegrity
Description:
Originally registered as Industrial Integrity, the word indegrity stems from the same two words “Industrial & Integrity”.
 
Bringing you a cumulative experience of more than 40 years in inspection industry, we at indegrity takes pride in bringing the top talent from the inspection, testing and calibration industry under one roof. Indegrity aims to deliver top services to meet industrial demand for inspection, testing and certification while maintaining the highest level of authenticity and integrity. Our vision is to address the gaps in the inspection industry, especially by countering the issuance of fake certificates & inspection reports.
 
We believe in continuous improvement and ensure this by imparting continuous trainings to our teams regarding codes & ethics along with making them excel in technical certifications.
 
We differentiate ourselves from the rest through our speed, quality and authenticity. We are your partners in ensuring your asset’s integrity & reliability.  Reach us for fulfilling your Inspection, testing and certification needs today.

Name: Bentia Energy
Description:
El nombre Bentia simboliza nuestra admiración por la tierra y nuestro propósito de desarrollar sus recursos con responsabilidad y respeto.

Name: Expertise LLP (Kazakhstan)
Description: Expertise was founded in 1984 in Genoa offering technical assistance services, then developing into an Engineering and Technical Services Company mainly operating in the energy sector. Due to the market demands and the Client’s specific needs, only a year later, in 1985, the first sister company was established: Tre "O" Srl, specialized in Process Engineering, Manuals and Training. In 1993 Expertise started its venture in Kazakhstan, in the Karachaganak Oilfield Area. The great opportunities offered by the very new Kazakh market and the considerable request for specialized work in the area convinced Expertise to establish Expertise Sices Ltd, by joining forces with Sices S.p.A. In 1999 Expertise Sices Limited and Aksai Gas Service (Subsidiary of the Kazakh National Oil Company) founded the Kazakh company KIOS, that presently employs around 200 people. After years of growth and consolidation, KIOS is today a recognized and successful player in Kazakhstan. In December 2004 in order to streamline the Group’s operations, Tre "O" was converted into an Engineering Business Unit and merged into Expertise During the years Expertise has developed into a larger Group of Companies, founding: - Telford International Ltd with an operative Branch in Abu Dhabi / UAE - Expertise d.o.o. in Rijeka / Croatia - Proteco Sarl in Pointe-Noire / Congo - Expertise Libya for Oil Operations JSC in Tripoli / Libya - Expertise Mozambique Limitada in Pemba / Mozambique - Expertise LLP in Atyrau / Kazakhstan and various Branches in key areas, such as the Expertise Srl Branch in Atyrau / Kazakhstan to service the Caspian Development Project operations, the Expertise Srl Branch in Abu Dhabi, and the Expertise Srl Branch in Ashgabat / Turkmenistan.

We understand that our clients have individual requirements/objectives for data acquisition, analysis, and interpretation; and we enable them to create a fit for purpose program based on their unique needs and budgetary goals.

Name: ACONCAGUA INGENIERÍA
Description:
Somos una empresa concebida y diseñada para gestionar soluciones de alto valor técnico en el sector industrial, con objetivo en el rubro energético, minero y Oil&Gas.

Somos creativos, íntegros, puntuales, transparentes y focalizados. Perseguimos empáticamente, junto con nuestros clientes, la solución que necesiten. Estamos con ellos en el proceso y seremos parte de sus logros.

Buscamos crecer a través de nuestra gente, nuestro equipo, grandes profesionales que comparten y se mimetizan con nuestras características, potenciando día a día su nivel de profesionalismo enfocados en la adquisición de nuevos conocimientos y competencias.

La clave de desarrollo se basa en dos pilares fundamentales: poner a disposición de nuestros clientes la experiencia ganada, avalada por más de 10 años de trabajo continuo en la región; y vivir en cada decisión presente y futura los valores que nos caracterizan como personas, elegidos como valores corporativos, que son nuestra base fundacional.

Esto nos permitirá ser la empresa de mayor prestigio técnico en la región en el año 2030.

Description:

The establishment of Morimatsu Dialog (Malaysia) Sdn Bhd (MDMSB) provides one-stop technical & fabrication solutions for process modules & skids, offshore topside modules and core process & pressure equipment, reactor, columns & heat exchanger for oil, gas, petrochemical, chemical / Fine chemical, mineral mining, fertilizer (Ammonia & Urea), new energy and pharmaceutical industries.

Name: Italfluid Geoenergy Srl
Description:
Italfluid  è una società fondata nel 1975 dal Prof. Guido Soavi, già dirigente della Montecatini e Professore di Chimica del Petrolio all'Università di Genova. Dal 1980 anche con l’affiancamento al Professore dell’Ing. Nicola Di Paolo (chimico) , Italfluid si è continuamente evoluta e cresciuta, ed è oggi la più importante società italiana di servizi per l'Upstream Oil Industry.
Italfuid è un’azienda “multiservices” che fornisce servizi competitivi  basati su una pluriennale esperienza nel campo dell’oil&gas, disponendo di strutture dedicate in Italia, Medio Oriente, Nord Africa e Centro-Sud America. L'azienda possiede i mezzi e requisiti per poter operare su tutti i tipi di giacimenti petroliferi in tutto il mondo in una logica di soluzioni “chiavi in mano” EPC / EPF.
Italfluid dispone di impianti e attrezzature chiavi-in mano e ha l'esperienza e il know-how per proporre soluzioni innovative che consentono riduzioni di tempi e costi rispetto agli standard internazionali, garantendo enormi guadagni in termini di efficienza, il tutto realizzato da un team di ingegneri che possono vantare numerosi incarichi portati a termine con successo.

Name: ALTTION
Description:
Now, we are ALTTION, a large family in which each of its divisions is a specialist in its field.

A benchmark in industrial services of a high technical level in highly demanding environments due to their complexity and risk: anti-corrosion treatments, passive fire protection, assembly and rental of scaffolding, rope access and inspection and repair of wind turbine blades.

The companies that make up the ALTTION group are:
• ALTTION Depisa Protective Coatings: specialist in anticorrosion in the Oil&Gas, Chemical, Power Generation and Distribution, Mining and Industry sectors in general.
• ALTTION Siasa Marine Coatings: specialist in anticorrosion in the Naval and Offshore sector.
• ALTTION Asturblast Protective Coatings: shot blasting and industrial painting workshop located in Asturias.
• ALTTION Tarracoblast Protective Coatings: shot blasting and industrial painting workshop located in Tarragona.
• ALTTION Mekanotub Scaffolding Solutions: specialist in assembly and rental of scaffolding in the Oil&Gas and industry sectors in general.
• ALTTION Ronergy Wind Services: specialist in inspection and repair of wind turbine blades in the wind sector.

We have Business Units in different locations in Spain. This allows us to accompany our clients throughout the entire national territory and also abroad. In addition, we have a staff of highly qualified specialists and state-of-the-art machinery. And at ALTTION we are fully committed to safety and respect for the environment.

Together, we will go even further.

Name: Chinook Consulting Services
Description: Chinook Consulting  is a Canadian  company providing subsurface services, specialized in Wellsite Geology, Geosteering and Geoscience studies catering to the upstream energy industry. Chinook offers the services of well trained energy consultants with extensive experience throughout the world, from conventional exploration to unconventional development with vertical, directional or horizontal wells, applied in wildcat exploration, large scale development projects and everything in between. Chinook is a leading provider of services for alternative resource projects such as geothermal, lithium, helium, hydrogen and carbon storage.

Name: ONSITE3D
Description:
ONSITE3D is an Indigenous-owned VDC (virtual design and construction) company that offers a comprehensive range of services to the industrial and construction sectors. Our innovative front-end planning and design process leverage advanced technology and highly skilled labour to optimize project efficiency, minimize waste, and reduce the risk of cost and schedule overruns.

Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility uses automated welding to prefabricate components, ensuring precise and consistent quality. And our experienced construction and maintenance crews provide expert support with every step of the way, from the field to final commissioning.

From start to finish, ONSITE3D is your trusted partner for turn-key VDC solutions that deliver exceptional results.

Name: Condor Energies
Description: Condor is a Canadian energy transition company based in Calgary, AB with ongoing energy and lithium initiatives in Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan and Türkiye.

Name: Exergy Solutions
Description:
Exergy Solutions is a Canadian engineering, fabrication, and delivery partner that specializes in turning innovative technologies into buildable, field-ready systems. Founded in 2012, Exergy has over a decade of experience supporting clients across clean technology, energy, and mining by bridging the gap between concept-level design and real-world execution.

Exergy is best known for designing, building, and deploying first-of-kind and pilot-scale systems, particularly where technologies are novel, timelines are aggressive, and operational risk must be actively managed. Our teams bring an operator’s mindset, combining rigorous engineering with hands-on fabrication, commissioning, and site support to ensure systems perform as intended in real operating environments.

Our capabilities span process, mechanical, electrical, and controls engineering, supported by in-house fabrication, advanced manufacturing (3D printing), assembly, and on-site commissioning and startup support.                               
We partner closely with technology developers to de-risk and scale novel processes from concept through pilot and early commercial deployment. In parallel, our advisory services support technology strategy, scale-up planning, constructability, and early cost and risk definition, helping clients make informed decisions at critical inflection points.

For asset owners, Exergy acts as an Owner’s Engineer, supporting technology integration, debottlenecking, sustaining capital programs, and value-engineering initiatives across existing operations. We deliver practical, execution-focused engineering that improves reliability, throughput, safety, and operability, working seamlessly with internal teams and vendors.

With integrated facilities and an agile delivery model, Exergy helps clients move faster without EPC bloat or over-engineering, while maintaining a strong focus on safety, quality, and operational performance.

Name: PT. Strukturindo Tifatama
Description:
PT. Strukturindo Tifatama is a company that has operated for more than 20 years and has an active role in development in the country, especially in mining services and general contractor.

The Company has grown through experiences and learning processes that have been passed for years, so as the company will continuously grow and develop in accordance with the company’s strategic plan. The trust that has given by the Government and private companies has created numerous works that are spread across different sectors include civil,steel structure, construction,roads, bridges and so on.

The commitment of PT Strukturindo Tifatama to complete every job cannot be separated from the role of each member of PT Strukturindo Tifatama in planning, implementing and controlling projects with various methods, as well as paying atten- tion to HSE requirements (Occupational Safety, Health and the Environment).

Completing work processes will not run well without the support and good cooperation from PT Strukturindo Tifatama company partners (suppliers, sub-contractors and high-competent human re- sources) as a manifestation of learning and experience processes for company. We are ready to provide the best construction works.

Name: PX Energy
Description:
A PX Energy é uma refinaria que conta com processo produtivo contínuo na exploração do xisto (folhelho pirobetuminoso). Produzimos principalmente óleo, nafta, GLP e gás combustível, além de enxofre e insumos para fertilizantes. 

A empresa nasce comprometida com os princípios de ESG, ética, segurança e rentabilidade, com responsabilidade social e ambiental, focando na continuidade operacional, sustentabilidade, buscando  agregar valor aos clientes e na comunidade onde atua.

Name: Pittsburgh Mineral & Environmental Technology, Inc. (PMET)
Description:
PMET is Veteran Owned Small Business that provides a wide range of inspection services; we are committed to high-quality service and offer call-out services to bring our inspection team to your project.  Pittsburgh Mineral & Environmental Technologies (PMET) is proud of its talented teams of inspection personnel, who have worked with various energy companies.

PMET provides accredited laboratory services for soils, corrosion, positive material identification (PMI), additive manufacturing, plastic, ceramic, rubber, oil, coatings, plating, adhesive, etc.  In addition, PMET offers analytical laboratory techniques and testing methods, providing the critical analysis information you need for troubleshooting, research, quality control, and many other requirements and applications.  Our lab services include Qualitative & Quantitative X-Ray Diffraction (QXRD), Scanning Electron Microscopy (SEM), Energy Dispersive X-Ray Analysis (EDX), CP Atomic Emission Spectroscopy (ICP-AES), ICP Mass Spectroscopy (ICP-MS), Energy Dispersive X-ray Spectrometry (SEM/EDS), Atomic Emission Spectroscopy (AES/OES), Fourier Transform Infrared Spectroscopy (FTIR), and more.

PMET is a full-service technology development and service company specializing in metals and minerals processing, coal ash utilization, waste stream management, and precision analysis.  We have developed and commercialized technologies dedicated to waste minimization, treatment, and the conversion of industrial wastes to safe, usable, and profitable products.  

We have many of our technologies patented, including coal ash utilization, fly-ash / carbon separation, carbon upgrade technology, heavy metal removal / recovery technologies, mercury removal / recovery, and lead removal / recovery technologies.

Name: KBSS

Congress for Africa’s Mineral Resources Development (CAMRED)

The Congress for Africa’s Mineral Resources Development (CAMRED) is a leading platform dedicated to advancing Africa’s mineral sector. Focus Areas
	•	Policy & Investment – Strengthening governance and regulatory frameworks.
	•	Local Content & Value Addition – Promoting beneficiation and job creation.
	•	Sustainability & ESG – Encouraging responsible mining practices.
	•	Innovation & Technology – Showcasing advancements in exploration and processing.
	•	Artisanal & Small-Scale Mining (ASM) – Supporting SMEs, women, and youth.

Upcoming CAMRED 2025

 1 – 3 October 2025 |  Hilton Grand Nile Tower, Cairo, Egypt

The next edition will further drive investment, innovation, and collaboration to unlock Africa’s mineral potential.

Name: Learning from Normal Work
Description:
Learning From Normal Work (LFNW) is a research-backed safety framework built on Human & Organisational Performance (HoP), Safety II, and Human Factors.

Instead of waiting for accidents to learn, we look at how work is done day-to-day - helping identify hidden risks, strengthening systems in response, and preventing accidents before they happen.

Trusted by companies like BP, Johnson & Johnson, and Siemens, we support organisations in three key ways:

Training – Specialised training programmes for senior leaders, HSE, quality, supervisors, and frontline teams - available individually or as part of a wider implementation.

Enterprise Implementation – Embedding LFNW into your existing processes with a step-by-step, tailored approach with specialised training, KPIs, processes, templates, tools and more.

Free Resources – Email courses, videos, podcasts, and guides to understand the principles.

Learning From Normal Work equips organisations to:

- Identify and address hidden risks before they escalate.
- Strengthen systems and reduce repeat incidents.
- Build lasting capability across leaders and teams without needing long-term outside support.

Founded by Dr. Marcin Nazaruk, an award-winning safety transformation leader and recognised author of industry guidance for the Energy Institute, IOGP, LFNW brings proven tools and a practical roadmap to deliver proactive safety at scale.

Name: POISK Group LLC
Description:
Patented Technology - POISK Equipment.

WHAT WE OFFER:
>Remote Sensing with Nuclear Magnetic Resonance Technology (RSNMR)
>Direct detection of presence or absence of hydrocarbon, minerals, RE, Hydrogen, Geothermal, Ground water.
>Time and Cost-Effective solution to hydrocarbon and mineral exploration.
>Drilling recommendation
>Depth determination up to 7000 meters
>Reducing exploration risk by reducing dry wells.

THE SCIENCE: 
Nuclei of an element shows characteristic NMR spectra in presence of Earth’s magnetic field. POISK Group has developed the Patented technology to identify the presence of a particular element in Earth’s subsurface by exploiting the NMR spectra phenomenon of elements recorded over an multi-spectral analog satellite imagery. By identifying the rare earth elements present in the hydrocarbon molecules, we can identify the presence of hydrocarbon molecules in the Earth’s subsurface. The areal extent of the hydrocarbon deposits and tectonic faults, identified using POISK equipment, can be plotted over a digital map.

POINTS FOR CONSIDERATION:
-Cost-effective and Time-effective technology for identifying the focus area of hydrocarbons and other minerals in Offshore and Onshore.
-Unique	technology	exploiting	the	NMR	phenomenon	on	satellite analog	imagery	to	identify hydrocarbon acumen.
-The	accuracy	after	Stage-1	study	is	about	60% - 85% and	after	performing	the	field	study (Stage-2) the accuracy goes up to 95%.
-Finalizing Seismic data acquisition program is more focused and economic.
-The technology helps in identifying and validating the drilling locations.
-This Technology is very useful in an operationally and logistically challenging areas.
-Vertical depth accuracy of the anomaly after Stage-1 is about100m and after Stage-2 is about 30-50m.
-The total time for the execution of RS-NMR exploration work on a survey area of 1000 sq. km. is approximately 3 months for Stage-1.

This breakthrough process not only tackles two of the world’s biggest waste challenges — plastics and rubber — but also transforms them into an affordable, scalable, and sustainable energy source for industries, communities, and entire nations.

At BlueSword Energy, we know that technology alone is not enough. That’s why we are building a bold global network of experts, policymakers, engineers, strategists, and visionaries through our Digital BlueSword Energies Committee. This digital committee brings together the best minds to help shape the direction, policy, and expansion of the energy sector for decades to come.

Through our integrated approach, BlueSword Energy is innovating new ways to deploy our clean, low-cost fuel across high-value industries — from powering data centers and crypto mining operations, to supplying energy grids and off-grid communities in emerging markets. Our solutions are designed to meet and exceed the world’s strictest ESG standards, aligning with global commitments to clean energy, sustainability, and renewable resources.

By joining the BlueSword Energies Digital Committee, professionals and experts gain access to an influential network of industry leaders, policy shapers, and our fast-growing global team. Together, we are not just discussing the future of energy — we are building it, piece by piece, nation by nation.

⸻

Join us. Innovate with us. Shape the future of energy.

Name: Women in Mining, Oil&Gas Conference

Name: Loring Tarcore Labs Ltd.
Description:
Loring Tarcore Labs is a leading oil sands specialty laboratory resulting from the merger of a Canadian pioneering oil and gas laboratory with over 60 years of history and the next generation integrated oil sands laboratory.

Our history can be traced back to 1948 when Chemical & Geological Laboratories Ltd. (C&G Lab) was founded as a pioneering laboratory based on demand from the Canadian oil and gas industry. Throughout the years, C&G evolved and expanded with the industry, changing the company name three times before it eventually became part of Loring Tarcore Labs Ltd. in 2014. However, one thing that has remained consistent over the years is that the focus of the company has always been on the Canadian energy sector.

Established in 2006 through the partnership between Loring Laboratories and oil sands veteran Dr. Greg Hu, Loring Tarcore Labs Ltd.(Tarcore Labs) started as a next generation oil sands laboratory – laboratory analytical services integrated with digital core image-assisted core logging services that are offered by DigitCore Library Inc., a sister company that is also founded by Dr. Hu. This approach results in Tarcore’s patented Integrated Digital Workflow (idWorkflowTM). Through the use of idWorkflowTM, a new industry trend for integrated laboratory analytical and core logging services would occur, resulting in a more timely completion of large core projects.

Building on the strengths of the long history of C&G Lab, and the trend-setting innovations of Tarcore Labs and its sister company DigitCore Library Inc. for core logging software and services (or the Tarcore Group of Companies), Tarcore Group of Companies is a powerhouse to serve Canada's expanding oil sands industry for integrated laboratory analytical and core logging services. With its industry benchmark quality of analytical reports and quick turnaround time, an increasing number of organizations are selecting the Tarcore Group of Companies as their primary analysis provider.

Name: Association of Mineral, Energy, Oil & Gas Host Communities in East Africa (AMEOGHCEA)
Description:
About AMEOGHCEA
The Association of Mineral, Energy, Oil, Gas, and Host Communities of East Africa (AMEOGHCEA) is the bold, unyielding voice of East Africa’s resource-rich host communities. We are a people-powered movement committed to justice, equity, and transformation in the heart of Africa’s extractive zones.
Founded to respond to the growing crises of environmental degradation, displacement, and disempowerment, AMEOGHCEA champions the rights of communities affected by oil, gas, mineral, and energy development. We demand fair policies, protect ancestral lands, and work to ensure that the wealth beneath our feet uplifts—not oppresses—those who live above it.
Yet our mission goes even deeper. Across East Africa, extractive-rich regions have become hotspots of civil conflict, fueled by weak political systems, fragile security, and a critical lack of indigenous capacity to manage resources. Without inclusive governance and strong community leadership, extraction becomes exploitation.
Our Origin
What began in 2023 as a growing coalition of platforms—including the Africa council of Small Business and Entrepreneurship (ACOSBE), the Eco-Rights Defenders Network, the Women’s Environment Forum, the Association of Oil and Gas Hosting Communities of Uganda (AOGHCU), Alliance of Grassroots Women Associations (AGWA) and the Global Health Youth Platform—evolved into a united front demanding stronger action.
We started by advocating for the inclusion of women, youth, and indigenous peoples in environmental governance, legal reforms, and community-led development. But escalating injustices—land grabs, forced evictions, polluted ecosystems, and cultural erosion—required more than fragmented efforts.
In 2025, AMEOGHCEA was formally registered in Uganda as a company limited by guarantee, establishing a strategic base to serve communities across the East African Community and beyond.
Our Mission
To transform extractive zones into centers of justice, peace, and sustainable development

Name: National Oil Spill Detection and Response Agency
Description:

It is an Agency under the Federal Ministry of Environment to coordinate the implementation of the National Oil Spill Contingency Plan (NOSCP) which also incorporates the National Oil Spill Contingency System (NOSCS) for Nigeria, in compliance with the International Convention on Oil Pollution Preparedness, Response and Cooperation (OPRC 1990), to which the country is a signatory.

The National Oil Spill Contingency System (NOSCS) is a harmonisation of all relevant regulations, organisations, personnel, procedures, facilities, equipment, and logistical support to respond to a spill, reduce the negative impact and manage all related issues.

Name: PurePlynt Energy Inc.
Description:
PUREPLYNT ENERGY INC. 
The Plynt Tech surfactant was originally developed to address marine oil spills, and with great success in testing. However, the inventor spent too much time getting approved by the US Coast Guard and individual states; with not enough oil spills taking place to build a successful business. We have since pivoted to all Oil & Gas opportunities, and had several of the Plynt Tech formulas approved by the EPA under the ‘Bio Preferred Program’. Plynt Tech also has the designation of “Ultimate” for biodegradability and can be used in any ‘sensitive’ setting where disposal or run off is an issue.
Plynt Tech products have been used for EOR, equipment maintenance and cleaning, site remediation projects, and more. Plynt Tech surfactants also achieve great results in several non-energy fields such as Hospitality, Food Prep. A 100% plant based bio-surfactant that is 1.2NM small, meaning that it can get where other chemicals cannot and free up the crude to flow naturally. 
The nano sized molecular structure of FlowTec gets between the crude and the formation, mechanicals etc while also breaking down the asphaltenes and paraffins. FlowTec will also kill 99% of all existing bacteria and prevent further bacterial formation or corrosion. 
FlowTec can be used in vertical production wells, hydraulic fracturing operations, and coiled tubing operations. Once FlowTec is introduced to the well, the expectation is additional production while remediating bacteria, paraffin and asphaltenes. paration equipment cleaning.

Ability to select the right choice for your gas turbine compressor are earned from wide experience and specialisation whether it is in marine, aviation, Oil & Gas and Energy & Power applications.

 Subsurface Integrity & Containment: Expert high resolution fracture and fault characterisation for reservoir connectivity, caprock assurance, and leak path risk assessment.

 Integrated Subsurface Modelling & Assurance: Definitive foundations for Petrophysical, Static, Dynamic, and 1D Mechanical Earth Models (MEM).

 Digital Technical Assurance: Programmatic workflows for data conditioning, QC, and expert labelled datasets — ensuring your data is AI ready.

 Software Agnostic Integration: Independent interpretation and seamless data unification across Petrel, Techlog, IP, Kingdom, DUG, JewelSuite, TerraStation, LogIC, and more.

Who We Serve

Operators, CCUS developers, geothermal teams, mining companies, regulators, and subsurface consultancies requiring specialist, independent technical assurance.

Why Apricity?

We focus on the high value petrophysical and borehole image log analysis that prevent the multi million dollar failures often caused by low cost interpretation.
No junior dilution. No generic workflows. Just expert level, defensible subsurface insight.

Our patent-pending Flex Compute technology monetizes unused power generation capacity at electric frac locations by deploying mobile data centers that scale compute loads instantly as excess power becomes available.

Electric frac sites already have the natural gas infrastructure, high-density power generation, and data-rich environments that AI and compute workloads thrive on. Comp-U-Frac transforms this underutilized capability into a revenue-generating platform for operators, reducing effective power gen cost, increasing load efficiency, and capturing digital value from every spare megawatt.

Our on-site edge compute units support:

• Digital asset mining
• AI inference workloads
• Real-time frac analytics
• Predictive maintenance + equipment failure modeling
• Sensor fusion for frac, wireline, and fluid logistics
• High-resolution camera, drone, and robotic systems

With more than a decade of electric frac design, turbine optimization, and digital workflow experience, the Comp-U-Frac team understands the operational realities of the padsite. Our systems are engineered to respond in sub-seconds, ensuring zero operational risk while maximizing energy capture and operator benefit.

We turn wasted energy into value.
We turn frac locations into edge compute hubs.
Welcome to the digital frontier of the oilfield!

Name: LubrInfo
Description:

Lubrinfo is a global leader in the next generation of equipment maintenance and health monitoring using advanced real-time oil analysis which enables a dramatic reduction in your equipment operating costs. Adopted by some of the world’s largest equipment operators, our systems are proven to reduce maintenance costs, reduce oil consumption, reduce break downs and reduce carbon footprint. Our systems are easily fitted to any equipment using any oil in any application.

Our unique technology analyses oil at a molecular level in real time, detecting all and any changes caused by either contamination or wear. Combined with Lubrinfo analytics this enables accurate identification and prediction of optimal maintenance based on equipment need instead of time-based scheduling. Under Mr. Khan’s visionary guidance, Maple Core leverages cutting-edge expertise and a results-driven approach to unlock energy potential, foster innovation, and contribute to sustainable development in the energy and mineral sectors.

Name: PT. Surya Brinka Persada
Description:
PT. Surya Brinka Persada (BRINKA) adalah perusahaan nasional yang bergerak di bidang konsultan geosaintis terpadu dan kontraktor pengeboran sumur dalam, dengan fokus utama pada solusi teknik kebumian yang berlandaskan riset ilmiah, ketepatan data, serta penerapan teknologi modern. Didirikan oleh para profesional dengan pengalaman lintas disiplin di bidang geologi, hidrogeologi, geoteknik, geofisika, dan geodesi, BRINKA hadir untuk menjawab kebutuhan akan layanan teknik yang akurat, efisien, dan berkelanjutan.

Sebagai kontraktor air tanah berizin resmi, BRINKA mengelola pekerjaan pengeboran sumur dalam dari tahap eksplorasi hingga implementasi lapangan dengan standar keselamatan dan mutu tinggi. Di sisi lain, melalui divisi konsultan geosaintis, BRINKA menawarkan layanan survei dan kajian yang mencakup analisis geoteknik, pemetaan geologi, survei geofisika, estimasi sumber daya air dan tambang, serta survei geomatika.

Dengan semangat integritas, inovasi, dan kolaborasi, BRINKA berkomitmen menjadi mitra terpercaya bagi instansi pemerintah, industri, maupun sektor swasta dalam mewujudkan pembangunan infrastruktur dan pengelolaan sumber daya alam yang berkelanjutan.

Name: ChoraQuest LLC
Description:
ChoraQuest delivers expert land management, mineral title research, and GIS mapping solutions that turn complex data into actionable intelligence for the energy, mining, and renewable sectors.

WHO WE SERVE

We partner with exploration companies, junior miners, major producers, renewable energy developers, and private equity firms investing in natural resources. Our clients rely on us to de-risk acquisitions, secure land rights, and navigate complex federal and state regulations.

WHAT WE DO

GIS Mapping & Spatial Analysis
High-precision mapping using Esri ArcGIS Pro for exploration, compliance, and asset management. We deliver georeferenced map books, shapefiles, topographic overlays, and custom spatial analysis reports that support critical decision-making.

Mineral Title Research & Due Diligence
Comprehensive title verification traced back to original federal patents. We identify encumbrances, verify ownership chains, and deliver detailed reports that eliminate legal surprises and protect your investments.

Mining Claim Staking
Complete claim staking documentation and filing packages. We excel at high-volume production—delivering documentation for dozens or hundreds of claims within days. We handle all BLM and county filings to ensure full regulatory compliance.

Custom GIS Development
Bespoke GIS tools, automations, and applications tailored to your unique operational challenges. We've built proprietary tools that generate location certificates and staking documents at scale, removing critical bottlenecks from the acquisition workflow.

Whether you're exploring new prospects, acquiring assets, or managing an existing portfolio, we provide the GIS mapping, title research, and land management expertise you need to move forward with confidence.

Name: LNG Terminal South
Description:
Ukraine historically discovered a first natural gas deposit in Soviet Union. It was the Dashava gas deposit located in Lviv area. With the commissioning of the Dashava gas deposit in 1924 the formation of Ukrainian gas industry practically began and the creation of dense regional system of Prykarpattya gas pipelines gave impetus to the creation of Ukraine’s future gas transportation system. For almost half a century Dashava supplied natural gas to heat Moscow.

A lot of things have changed since that time. And now Ukraine is dependent on the Russian natural gas. This investment project is the first one in Ukraine to uring LNG from all over the world just to the Ukrainian gas transportation system.

The project enables Ukrainian energy independence and stability for the coming generations.

The project will significantly influence the economy of Ukraine: 
- 200 mln cubic meters of natural gas is the terminal's yearly turnover capacity
- 143 new jobs will be created after the construction of the terminal
- 122 mln USD is expected to be invested into the construction of terminal
- 19 mln USD of taxes will be paid by the terminal's operator every year.

Description:

L'équipe expérimentée de Fomico est dédiée à fournir un service client exceptionnel, en offrant des conseils d'experts, une assistance technique et des solutions sur mesure pour chaque entreprise. L'entreprise s'engage à établir des relations de confiance à long terme avec ses clients, en offrant des produits de qualité supérieure et en assurant une satisfaction totale.

Fomico joue un rôle essentiel dans le développement industriel du Congo en fournissant des solutions adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque entreprise. En tant que partenaire fiable, Fomico contribue à la croissance et à la prospérité des entreprises dans le monde entier en leur fournissant les outils nécessaires pour optimiser leurs opérations et renforcer leur compétitivité sur le marché.

Name: Learning from Normal Work
Description:
Learning From Normal Work (LFNW) is a research-backed safety framework built on Human & Organisational Performance (HoP), Safety II, and Human Factors.

Instead of waiting for accidents to learn, we look at how work is done day-to-day - helping identify hidden risks, strengthening systems in response, and preventing accidents before they happen.

Trusted by companies like BP, Johnson & Johnson, and Siemens, we support organisations in three key ways:

Training – Specialised training programmes for senior leaders, HSE, quality, supervisors, and frontline teams - available individually or as part of a wider implementation.

Enterprise Implementation – Embedding LFNW into your existing processes with a step-by-step, tailored approach with specialised training, KPIs, processes, templates, tools and more.

Free Resources – Email courses, videos, podcasts, and guides to understand the principles.

Learning From Normal Work equips organisations to:

- Identify and address hidden risks before they escalate.
- Strengthen systems and reduce repeat incidents.
- Build lasting capability across leaders and teams without needing long-term outside support.

Founded by Dr. Marcin Nazaruk, an award-winning safety transformation leader and recognised author of industry guidance for the Energy Institute, IOGP, LFNW brings proven tools and a practical roadmap to deliver proactive safety at scale.

Name: Laboratório de Modelagem Geológica de Reservatórios (MGR)
Description: O Laboratório de Modelagem Geológica de Reservatórios (MGR) faz parte do grupo de laboratórios do Centro de Estudos de Energia e Petróleo (CEPETRO), localizado na Universidade Estadual de Campinas (UNICAMP). O laboratório tem como objetivo caracterizar rochas reservatório desde a escala microscópica, atuando na descrição textural das rochas e suas propriedades petrofísicas até a escala macro e megascópica, envolvendo a geometria dos corpos geológicos e sua arquitetura deposicional. Esse processo envolve uma diversidade de atividades como: a caracterização petrográfica de amostras de rocha, com foco na descrição dos processos diagenéticos e do espaço poroso; o levantamento de propriedades de perfis de poços como perfis elétricos, radioativos e magnéticos; e também a interpretação sísmica para o identificação de estruturas de grandes dimensões. A integração de todas essas informações possibilita o desenvolvimento de modelos geológicos de reservatório que são utilizados na compreensão do desenvolvimento de um campo de petróleo. O laboratório possui um conjunto de computadores de alta performance (workstations) e também uma sala para descrição e análise de testemunho equipada com microscópio petrográfico e lupa.

Name: PRH 14.1 Geologia do Petróleo

O programa envolve atividades em nível de graduação e pós-graduação, oferecendo oportunidade para desenvolver atividades dentro de projetos de pesquisa específicos nas áreas de estratigrafia e análise de bacias, geocronologia, caracterização estratigráfica e diagenética de reservatórios e petrologia orgânica. 

O curso oferece bolsas integrais de estudos em todos os níveis e uma completa infra-estrutura (biblioteca setorial atualizada e de amplo acervo, laboratórios de análise geoquímica, organo-química, palinológica, micropaleontológica, microsonda, espectrômetro, além de recursos computacionais, frota de veículos para trabalho de campo). 

O corpo docente é formado integralmente por doutores, de reconhecida atuação no país e no exterior, muitos sendo pesquisadores do CNPq e coordenadores de projetos de pesquisa em cooperação com o setor produtivo e com instituições de pesquisa do Brasil e exterior.

Name: Geoenergía Student Chapter
Description:
Geoenergía is the official student chapter of the “Asociación Colombiana de Geólogos y Geofísicos de la Energía” (ACGGP) and the “American Association of Petroleum Geologists” (AAPG) at Universidad del Norte, Barranquilla, Colombia. With over 80 active members, we are a multidisciplinary group of students committed to promoting geoscientific knowledge, professional development, and strengthening the link between academia and industry.

Our mission is to empower the next generation of geologists and related professionals through the organization of technical workshops, academic lectures, outreach activities, and networking events. We focus on key areas such as subsurface exploration, energy and mineral resources, sustainable development, data science applied to geosciences, and other fundamental Earth science topics. With the support of our sponsoring organizations, we collaborate closely with national and international professionals to foster student engagement with current challenges and opportunities in geosciences and the energy transition.

Geoenergía is more than a student chapter — it's a platform for leadership, innovation, and connection between academia and the productive sector.

Contact us at: grupoestgeoenergia@uninorte.edu.co
Instagram: @geoenergia.un

Name: Larin Engineering HHC
Description:
Larin Engineering HHC is a dynamic and innovative company specializing in the implementation, development, and production of renewable energy sources, with a primary focus on natural (white) hydrogen. Their expertise lies in developing and implementing cutting-edge technologies for the search and production of this clean energy resource.

The team at Larin Engineering HHC comprises professional engineers and geologists with a diverse background in energy fields, ranging from the oil and gas industry to renewable energy. Their deep expertise in natural hydrogen is built on decades of research, innovation, and numerous expeditions, making them leaders in this domain.

Larin Engineering HHC stands out for its pioneering methods in detecting and monitoring the emission of natural hydrogen from the Earth's surface and optimizing its production processes. They have successfully conducted geological explorations, identifying potential hydrogen deposits worldwide, and have the know-how to build a complete production chain from extraction to consumer delivery. One of their notable achievements includes the development of a hydrogen deposit in Nebraska, USA.

Their commitment to meeting the growing demand for green energy is evident in their approach to producing white hydrogen, which they see as a key player alongside other renewable energy sources like wind, hydroelectric, and biogas plants. Larin Engineering HHC's extensive experience, competitive pricing, around-the-clock customer support, and ability to integrate hydrogen solutions into various scales of enterprises, including households, position them as a leading company in the renewable energy sector.

Name: Corpus Resources Plc
Description:
Corpus Resources is a UK listed global upstream energy and resources company focused in the natural resources space, specifically, the oil and gas sector, although, resource mining projects will also be considered. Corpus’s geographic focus includes, but is not limited to, Malaysia, Namibia and Eastern Europe.

Corpus Resources aims to create shareholder value by building a balanced portfolio of high-quality resources and energy development and production assets. Our initial focus is on projects that have existing production or are near production.

Founded in 2016 and listed in the UK on the London Stock Exchange in 2017 (as Curzon Energy plc), Corpus Resources has rebranded and repositioned itself with an new and experienced board and advisory team holding geological, engineering, production, planning, logistical and financial experience and skills.

The energy transition agenda creates opportunities as industry participants elect to exit the energy sector, with late-life-assets (with high existing embedded carbon footprints) providing value opportunities with significantly reduced carbon footprint. Furthermore, resources associated with the energy transition agenda are of strategic importance.

In assessing opportunities, the board and advisory team aim to identify and evaluate licence interests, licence assets and physical infrastructure assets that are currently producing, have the potential for rapid development or where there is scope for turnaround.

Key objectives are to mitigate risk, focus on cash flow generation and provide progressive returns to our shareholders.

Name: NEITI (Nigeria Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative)
Description:
In 2003, Nigeria voluntarily signed up to the global Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative (EITI). The decision to accede to the EITI and establish the Nigeria Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative (NEITI) was taken in the context of the comprehensive socio-economic reform programme embarked upon by the Federal Government of Nigeria during the second term of the former President Olusegun Obasanjo administration which commenced on May, 29, 2003.
The reform programme, which was encapsulated in the National Economic Empowerment Development Strategy (NEEDS), focused on four main areas namely to improve Nigeria’s macro-economic environment; pursue structural reforms; strengthen public expenditure management and implement institutional and governance reforms. Implementing the EITI in Nigeria by establishing the NEITI was part of the institutional and governance reforms. 
Nigeria joined the EITI to promote prudent management of revenues from its abundant natural resources to reduce poverty and ensure sustainable development.

Servicios Integrales Leimar, C. A nació en el año 1999 en la ciudad de El Tigre, Anzoátegui - Venezuela como "Cooperativa Cable Petrolca 12, R. L." para luego migrar a Servicios Integrales Leimar C.A. en el año 2007.

En nuestros inicios únicamente proporcionábamos servicios de Guaya Fina con dos unidades. Una de ellas era una cabina montada en un camión plataforma y la otra era una cabina cerrada. Los primeros servicios fueron una serie de chequeos mecánicos para pozos de abandono en el campo Jusepín.

Posteriormente, en el año 2001, iniciamos la fabricación de unidades y, hasta la fecha, hemos diseñado y fabricado 12 unidades de guaya fina y 6 unidades de guaya eléctrica.

El primer registro con Guaya Eléctrica fue realizado en el año 2006, cuando adquirimos una Herramienta Radial de Cementación de Computer Sonic Systems (CSS, ahora GE). Paralelamente nos iniciamos realizando otro tipo de servicios como cañoneo, asentamiento de tapones y empacaduras; así como tambien  servicios de recuperación de tubería.

Durante el año 2013 realizamos una alianza, para ofrecer Registros de Hoyo Abierto.

En la actualidad prestamos servicios en toda el área oriental de Venezuela, con bases operacionales en las ciudades de El Tigre (Anzoátegui) y Maturín (Monagas). 

Tenemos una larga lista de clientes satisfechos en PDVSA y en las diferentes empresas asociadas a ella.

Name: Piping3D
Description:
Piping3D is a rapidly growing company that aims to disrupt the conventional market with innovative technologies by optimizing customizable piping solutions. Founded in 2011 as LPMC Inc., the company initially specialized in industrial piping consulting. Since 2019, we have transitioned under the brand name Piping3D, focusing on 3D scanning, design, planning, inspections, installation, and preventive maintenance of industrial piping systems—particularly in the mining sector of the Labrador Trough, Northern Ontario, and Abitibi-Témiscamingue regions. Today, Piping3D is recognized as a leader in delivering innovative, safe, and cost-effective piping solutions.
Piping3D est une entreprise en pleine croissance qui vise à transformer le marché traditionnel grâce à des technologies innovantes, en optimisant des solutions de tuyauterie personnalisables. Avec une équipe dévouée de plus de 40 professionnels, Piping3D s’impose et gagne en reconnaissance dans le secteur minier de l’Est du Canada.

Fondée en 2011 sous le nom de LPMC Inc., la société était initialement spécialisée dans le conseil en tuyauterie industrielle. Depuis 2019, nous opérons sous la marque Piping3D, en mettant l’accent sur le balayage 3D, la conception, la planification, les inspections, l’installation et l’entretien préventif des systèmes de tuyauterie industrielle, particulièrement dans le secteur minier de la Fosse du Labrador, du Nord de l’Ontario et de l’Abitibi-Témiscamingue.

Aujourd’hui, Piping3D est reconnue comme un chef de file dans la livraison de solutions de tuyauterie innovantes, sécuritaires et rentables.

Name: BigSur Energy
Description:
From wellhead to compute revenue: converting stranded gas into modular data centers that generate on-site profits.

Energy supply is core to the technological and data centers industry. Off-grid power generation for on-site data centers provides a practical engineering solution for the monetization of stranded gas reserves.

By decoupling from conventional distribution infrastructures, this model enables the direct conversion of low-value stranded gas into high-value digital assets with super-low-cost electricity for powering modular data centers.

BigSur Energy transforms stranded or vented gas into a valuable power source for data centers, driving AI and Bitcoin mining.

Name: Geomechsim Technologies Inc.
Description:
Welcome to Geomechsim Technologies Inc.
We develop powerful simulation tools for the mining, geotechnical, and energy industries. Our flagship product, PCDC (Parallel Continuum-Discontinuum Code), a new generation of hybrid FEM and DEM program, enables explicit simulation of fracture, blasting, hydraulic fracturing, and more. 
Whether you're simulating fracture behavior of lab scale material, modelling complex excavation sequences, or solving stability problems on a large scale, we provide the tools and expertise to help you succeed.
Main features that set PCDC apart:
• High-performance hybrid FEM-DEM solver
• GPU acceleration for large-scale models
• Advanced fracture and damage mechanics
• Innovative Unified Cohesive Zone Model (UCZM)
• High-precision smooth contact algorithm, optimized for HFDEM contact problems
• Multi-physics coupling: thermo–hydro–mechanical interaction
• Fully open user-defined constitutive model interface

Name: EL Oil, Gas and Mining South Sudan
Description:
ChatGPT
South Sudan, the youngest country in Africa, possesses significant oil, gas, and mining resources that play a vital role in its economy. These sectors offer substantial opportunities for revenue generation, employment creation, and infrastructure development.

The oil industry is the backbone of South Sudan's economy, accounting for the majority of the country's revenue. South Sudan has significant proven oil reserves, particularly in the oil-rich regions of Upper Nile and Unity. The country's oil production peaked at around 350,000 barrels per day before the outbreak of civil conflict in 2013, which disrupted production and infrastructure. However, efforts are underway to restore and increase oil production. South Sudan has collaborated with international oil companies, including China National Petroleum Corporation (CNPC) and Malaysia's Petronas, to enhance oil exploration, production, and infrastructure development. The government of South Sudan has implemented policies to attract foreign investment, improve transparency, and ensure the sustainable management of oil resources.

South Sudan also possesses untapped potential in natural gas. The country has significant natural gas reserves associated with its oil fields, which can be exploited for domestic consumption and export. Currently, efforts are focused on increasing oil production, but the government has expressed its intention to explore and develop the country's natural gas resources in the future. This would not only diversify the country's energy sources but also have the potential to contribute to regional energy integration and export opportunities.

In terms of mining, South Sudan has abundant mineral resources, including gold, copper, iron ore, uranium, and diamonds. Gold mining is particularly prominent, with artisanal and small-scale miners playing a significant role in its extraction.

Основним завданням Підприємства є реалізація національного проекту «LNG Україна», а саме створення інфраструктури постачання скрапленого газу в Україну.
Основними напрямами діяльності Підприємства є:
- будівництво в Одеській області морського терміналу з приймання скрапленого природного газу (проектно-вишукувальні роботи – 2022р., будівельно-монтажні роботи, введення в експлуатацію – 2023-2024рр.);
- закупівля імпортованого скрапленого природного газу; регазифікація скрапленого природного газу; реалізація скрапленого природного газу, природного газу вітчизняним та іноземним покупцям (початок діяльності – 2021 р.).
На першому етапі планується проектування та будівництво основного приймального СПГ-термінала, придатного для розвантаження великих СПГ-танкерів місткістю 178 000 м3 (48 танкерів на рік); загальна ємність сховища для зберігання СПГ — 360 000 м3 (два резервуари ємністю по 180 000 м3); вихідна пропускна здатність — 570 776 нм3/год, еквівалентна 5 млрд кубометрів на рік (млрд куб. м/рік). Проектна потужність системи транспортування газу складає 1 1 41 553 нм3/год (10 млрд куб. м/рік).

Name: ExplosionProofCamera
Description:
Explosion Proof Cameras feature the latest software combined with operational excellence. Having the most up to date products on the market, ExPC are able to offer safe operation in the most hazardous areas with the best quality of service.

These areas are classified according to the quantity and type of flammable substances present, as well as the level of risk associated with their handling and storage. In areas at risk with flammable products, it's necessary to adopt preventive measures and safety precautions, such as explosion-proof cameras. ExPC's enclosures are designed, tested, and approved to the latest standards for gases, dust, and flying fibers.

The classification and regulation of hazardous areas vary according to the safety standards in force in each country. ExPC’s enclosures, due to their high level of quality and excellent performance, are globally certified with integrated cameras inside as a solution to national and international standards for hazardous areas where a flammable product may be present.

Explosion-proof cameras are an essential solution for surveillance and security in high-risk industrial environments. They provide effective protection, enable continuous monitoring, and ensure that operations are carried out safely, minimizing the risks of accidents and explosions. With their robust construction and advanced technology, these cameras are a valuable investment for any facility where safety is a priority.

In what environments are explosion-proof cameras used?
Oil refineries, oil and gas platforms, chemical industries, food processing plants, and any other areas where there is a risk of explosion are examples of places that require the installation of explosion-proof cameras. ExPC offers various models that meet the needs of your company or industry. Visit our website and check them out.

Name: McPhar International Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
McPhar is an Airborne Exploration Company, providing its services worldwide, with over 30 years of experience by its senior personnel. Our corporate and government clients are engaged in oil & gas exploration, mineral exploration, ground water exploration and surveying for environmental and/or engineering applications

The services we provide involve the acquisition of gravity and gravity gradient data, magnetic and magnetic gradient data, time domain and frequency domain electromagnetic data, gamma radiation and oil seep data.These services are provided by using from fixed-wing aircraft and/or helicopters.

The data acquired from such surveys are processed, mapped, imaged and interpreted at our data processing centers in India and/or South Africa.
The Airborne Geophysical Survey Industry has directly or indirectly contributed to numerous discoveries in the oil & gas sector.

Airborne geophysics have been used for petroleum exploration for many years, mainly aeromagnetic surveys, however recent years have seen the application of airborne electromagnetic data to the detection of hydrocarbons as well as effective airborne gravity.
The Airborne Geophysical Survey Industry has directly or indirectly contributed to numerous discoveries in the mining sector.

Airborne electromagnetics (AEM) has proven its worth for mining exploration for 40 years, it is inexpensive compared to ground geophysics and it provides information that is easily integrated with borehole, well logs, seismic, resistivity and ground EM.

Geophysical surveying tools aid the mining industry in finding minerals and elements for extraction and provide companies with detailed data on a property's geophysical composition.
Most of the world's liquid freshwater resources are stored underground as groundwater. Its distribution on earth is varied, however, and depends mainly on climatic conditions and the geology of the subsurface.

Description:
Jooyan Energy Niakan Company (JENK Iranian) is active in the field of designing, engineering services and procurement of all kinds of industrial and packaged type cooling towers, as well as supply of industrial and refinery equipment, including mechanical, electrical equipment, precision instruments and piping.

Water shortage and drought crisis are the biggest problems of the world today, and our country is not an exception. The dependence of many industries on water and the lack of sufficient water resources in the country is a strong motivation to achieve new methods to reduce water consumption in various industries.
One of these methods is the use of an integrated hybrid cooling tower system. Integrated hybrid cooling towers are the most up-to-dated technology used in water-intensive industries that have a significant ability to reduce water consumption, which seems to be a necessity due to the lack of water resources in our country.
In this system, by combining dry and wet cooling towers in one tower and controlling it by an intelligent system, annual water consumption will be reduced by 90%.

Name: MANTRAWEST LTD
Description:
Two decades in the industry has propelled Mantrawest as a multidisciplinary waste management and environmental solutions company operating at the heart of the oil, gas, and mining industries. We specialize in providing turnkey services for offshore and onshore waste treatment, environmental compliance, equipment rental (CCUs & TDUs), and the integration of blockchain based tokenization systems for transparency and accountability.

Our work begins where others hesitate at the intersection of industrial operations and environmental responsibility. Through advanced waste valorization techniques and compliance aligned processes, we help upstream and downstream operators handle drilling cuttings, contaminated mud, and hazardous waste streams with precision, speed, and minimal ecological impact.

As a privately held company, we maintain flexibility and agility, with a compact but highly capable team operating across Nigeria, West Africa, and the Gulf of Mexico region. We partner with exploration firms, FPSO operators, refineries, and government stakeholders to ensure cost effective environmental solutions that align with both regulatory expectations and ESG reporting mandates.

Key offerings include:

Rental and deployment of Cutting Container Units (CCUs) and Thermal Desorption Units (TDUs)

Full spectrum offshore waste logistics and treatment

Digital asset tracking and service tokenization

On site clean up, remediation, and documentation support

ESG aligned project development and compliance consulting


Mantrawest, innovation is not an option it’s our identity. We’re building systems that empower energy companies to track their environmental performance, convert waste into circular value, and access decentralized finance tools tied to environmental outcomes.

Name: Defender Safety Services Ltd.
Description:
Founded in 2023, Defender Safety Services is a Canadian, SECOR-certified firm created to meet the demanding safety and regulatory requirements of the oil, gas, and construction industries across Western Canada. 

Operating in some of the most inherently hazardous environments in the country, Defender delivers disciplined, practical loss-prevention solutions that protect people, assets, and operational continuity.

Our Services

Defender Safety Services provides end-to-end safety advisory and loss-prevention support, including:
	•	Development, implementation, and management of HSE programs, including COR / SECOR audits and Transportation (NSC) systems
	•	Full compliance site-management support through ISNetworld, ComplyWorks, Avetta, and similar platforms
	•	Assessment and planning for new divisions, mergers and acquisitions, and jurisdictional expansion
	•	Implementation of HSE software solutions to streamline administration and improve operational visibility
	•	Comprehensive organizational gap analyses and risk assessments
	•	Remote and on-site emergency response oversight, incident and accident management, and investigations
	•	Insurance liaison services and claims management
	•	WCB claims management, including reviews and appeals
	•	Development of project-specific and site-specific Safety Execution Plans, Emergency Response Plans, and Security Plans
	•	Prime Contractor program development to ensure full OHS compliance
	•	Staffing and oversight of safety personnel for capital projects and turnarounds
	•	Leadership, coaching, and mentorship of field-based safety teams
	•	Development and delivery of safety training programs

Our core focus is Loss Prevention and Safety Advisory Services across every phase of the oil and gas energy lifecycle — from planning and construction to operations, maintenance, and decommissioning.

Name: Fundidora Morelia
Description:
We started operations in 1982 gaining confidence of our partners and clients.

Our current melting capacity is 4,000 kg (8,800lb) per clean casting. We are specialized in the casting of ferrous alloys, specially steels. Additionally we have other services such as pattern and machine shops as well as the facilities needed to perform quality tests to guarantee the soundness of our products.

We currently manufacture pieces for industrial supplies and capital goods manufacturers. We supply manufacturers of pumps, turbines, high-pressure valves for petroleum extraction, and industrial parts in general.

For us, the manufacture of specialized products means working with a low production volume, with productions runs of generally no more than 10 or 15 castings, and under stricts quality specifications. We achieve this by having all the necessary equipment to assure the quality of our products in just one facility.

With this and the recognition and distinction that ISO 9001 certification confers upon us, we assume the unequivocal commitment to be one of the leading companies in casting of iron and steel pieces in Mexico.

Name: iRIS-2026
Description:
iRIS-2024, a hybrid event, will be held in London between 16 and 18 April 2024. Experts from leading academic institutions, E&P and mineral resource companies, geoscience research groups and imaging equipment manufacturers will share their experience of how to take advantage of the multiple imaging modes and scales on offer.  The program will be available on the website and registration will open in early January.

Rock imaging is a rapidly expanding science that uses a range of advanced technologies to gather digital data that, when processed and interpreted, can provide direct quantitative information of many rock properties over scales ranging from m to nm. Imaging techniques include simple 1D digital profiles of various properties down a length of core material; 2D imaging over a variety of wavelengths: infrared, white light, ultraviolet, X-ray; 2D and 3D scanning electron and ion microscopy; and 3D/4D X-ray CT imaging.

Not Another Contractor—A Crew That Actually Knows the Job inside out

Instrumentation’s been an afterthought for too long. We’re here to change that.
InstroEX was born out of frustration. Darren Butler, our founder, spent years working as an instrumentation technician across oil & gas, power generation, and heavy industry in the UK, New Zealand, and Australia. No matter where he worked, he kept seeing the same thing: instrumentation was treated like a sideline, tacked on as an afterthought. It wasn’t just inefficient—it was risky.
So when Darren moved to Western Australia, he knew what needed to happen. He built a company that puts instrumentation at the center, not the margins. Name: Scansolution Sdn Bhd
Description:
Scansolution Sdn. Bhd. is a Malaysian-owned technology company specializing in process diagnostic scanning and advanced maintenance, production solutions for the oil, gas, and petrochemical industries. We support clients across onshore, offshore, and subsea operations, helping them simplify production problems, improve efficiency, and enhance asset reliability.

*Onshore & Offshore Diagnostic Capabilities*

Column-Scan – gamma scanning to identify maldistribution, flooding, and mechanical issues in refinery, petrochemical and offshore production towers.

Neu-Scan – Thermal neutron scanning for moisture under insulation (MUI) and vessel phase determination.

Pipe-Scan – deposition profiling and pigging verification for pipelines.

Tomos-Scan – tomographic scanning for high-resolution imaging of process systems.

Heat Exchanger Leak Studies – rapid and accurate detection of tube leakage.

*Offshore & Subsea Diagnostics*

FMD (Flooded Member Detection) – non-intrusive subsea inspection to assess offshore structural integrity.

Subsea Pipe-Scan – advanced diagnostics for subsea pipelines, including Pipe-in-Pipe scanning and deepwater capability up to 1500m.

*Expanded Range of Solutions*

WI Discovery Leakage Detector – innovative leakage detection device for insulated pipelines.

SOAR System – safe and efficient automated tank cleaning with slop oil recovery technology.

*Why Scansolution?

Proprietary developed equipment and software, ensuring safer deployment, higher sensitivity, and faster results. 20+ years of technical experience supporting major operators in onshore, offshore, and subsea environments.
A collaborative, solution-driven approach, transforming inspection data into actionable insights that reduce downtime and extend asset life.

From refinery columns and pipelines to subsea assets in deepwater fields, Scansolution delivers diagnostic and engineering solutions that simplify problems and deliver measurable results.
