Name: EL KSR Oil, Gas, and Mining Uganda
Description:
Uganda, a landlocked country located in East Africa, has a growing oil, gas, and mining industry that holds significant potential for economic development. The country is rich in natural resources, including oil, gas, minerals, and precious metals, and has made notable progress in exploring and developing these sectors.

Uganda's oil and gas industry is a relatively new sector but has gained attention due to the discovery of substantial oil reserves in the Albertine Graben region. The country's estimated oil reserves exceed 6 billion barrels, and production is expected to begin in the near future. Major international oil companies, including Total, CNOOC, and Tullow Oil, have invested in exploration and development activities in Uganda. The government has put in place regulatory frameworks and established the Uganda National Oil Company (UNOC) to oversee the sector's management and ensure transparency and accountability.

The development of Uganda's oil and gas industry has the potential to transform the country's economy, create job opportunities, and drive infrastructure development. The government is actively pursuing partnerships with neighboring countries, such as Tanzania and Kenya, to construct pipelines for the export of oil and gas resources. These projects, including the East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP), will enhance regional integration and attract further investment.

Uganda's mining industry is diverse and holds significant potential for growth. The country is known for its deposits of various minerals, including copper, cobalt, gold, limestone, phosphates, and vermiculite. Gold mining has been a focal point, with several large-scale and artisanal mining operations contributing to the sector. Additionally, Uganda has substantial potential for rare earth elements, which are vital in various high-tech industries. The government has enacted policies to encourage investment in the mining sector and establish a conducive regulatory framework.

Name: ACERA (Australia Chinese Energy and Resource Association)
Description:
In line with today's global energy transition and the main themes of achieving low carbon, decarbonization, and clean green development, the former Western Australia Chinese Petroleum Association was approved by the relevant Australian authorities on March 15th, 2024 to be officially renamed as the "Australia Chinese Energy and Resource Association" (ACERA). Despite the name change, the association remains a non-governmental, non-profit industry organization. 

Building upon the original mission and purpose of the Western Australia Chinese Petroleum Association, the renamed association has expanded its geographical scope from Western Australia to the entire country and extended the attributes and connotations of energy resources. The focus areas have broadened from conventional oil and gas to include, but are not limited to, oil, natural gas, renewable energy, and hydrogen and other clean green energy and resource sectors. This change reflects the responsibility and commitment of energy professionals to renewable and green energy.

Name: CO2 Convert
Description:
After 16 years and 300 different formulas we have finally received our patent on water dissolvable ceramic based Frac Balls, Frac Plugs and Frac Buttons.  Our different formulas can be made for quick dissolve from as little as 15 minutes, to the extended resolve of up to 40 hours.  The balls, plugs and buttons are fully dissolvable in as little as 8 quarts of 100% water, saltwater or other frac fluids.  We can manufacture these products to withstand pressure up to 16,000 PSI.   Unlike other dissolvable products on the market place, our ceramic application has been engineered to dissolve at various well temperatures and precise dissolve rates and times.   As far as we know we are the only company in the world that has created the Dissolvable Frac Plug Buttons.  If companies are still drilling out or having to inject acid down hole after the balls and plugs go down, their system components are not fully dissolvable.  We are currently looking to sell the patent on our fully dissolvable formulas for the balls, plugs and buttons which will eliminate system drill out(s).   
We are bringing our new technology to market that is a coating system that creates a protective thin ceramic shell around local frac sands to meet API RP 19C Standards.  This reduces the costs and time when importing sands.  This application will allow gas and oil to flow through the wells easier, allows other chemistry's, lubricants and additives to be used in the process to improve compression strength, roundness and sphericity.  
This environmentally safe ceramic grout coating eliminates the dust, by binding the dust fines to your well pads and road aggregates.  Eliminating airborne particulate dust makes the site safer for your employees, saves on labor and maintenance costs and helps meet safety in regards to OSHA requirements.

Name: GeoTechnical Rock Lab
Description:
GeoTechnical Rock Lab specializes in cuttings cleaning, depth sorting, and expert subsurface interpretation to improve the accuracy and interpretability of cuttings-based data.

Many cuttings workflows fail before testing begins. Mixed, contaminated, or poorly documented samples can introduce false signals that no amount of downstream testing can correct. Our current focus is addressing this problem at its source.

We provide proprietary cuttings cleaning and depth-sorting workflows that restore depth integrity prior to analysis. This enables accurate testing and meaningful interpretation, whether measurements are performed by our team or by external laboratories.

In parallel, we deliver expert data integration and interpretation, connecting composition, texture, structure, and heterogeneity to actionable subsurface decisions. Our deliverables are designed to reduce uncertainty and directly support geological and engineering objectives.

GeoTechnical Rock Lab is actively expanding toward a full-service laboratory model. As we scale analytical capabilities, our guiding principle remains unchanged: accurate decisions depend first on sample integrity and expert interpretation.

Name: HR Work Doctor
Description:
HR Work Doctor is a family-owned company based out of 208 High Rd, Riverton, Western Australia.  

Having been in the industry since 2008, HR Work Doctor is a dedicated centre that performs pre-employment medical examinations for employers, recruiters and private requests in a timely and cost-efficient manner for a variety of industries and sectors.

HR Work Doctor assesses in the following:
Pre-employment Medicals
Musculoskeletal
Functional Capacity Evaluation
Audio (workcover hearing)
Spirometry 
Drug & Alcohol (laboratory & instant)
Mask Fit - Disposable & Half Mask
Ear Fit - Plug & Muff
Nickel Allergy Assessment
K10 Assessment
Heat Stress Assessment
Diabetes & Cholesterol

Alongside the above components, HR Work Doctor can also offer extended medicals, such as:
Rail Category 1, 2, 3 & 4
Commercial Drivers
Shot Firer’s Assessment
Dangerous Goods Assessment

HR Work Doctor aims on getting your results as quickly as possible.  All medical results will be emailed through to you on the same day as the appointment unless further information is required from the candidate’s usual medical practitioner.  Drug & Alcohol testing, instant results will be emailed the same day, however laboratory testing may take up to 24 hours for return of results.  Any delays are always communicated transparently.

Why Choose HR Work Doctor: we understand the importance of an efficient service to minimise delays in your recruitment process.  Our focus is on providing appointment availability and quick turnaround time with results.  All medical results are returned within hours a of the candidate appointment, so you can mobilise and on-board your employees and workers to site sooner.

Description: Talon is dedicated to bringing disruptive technology to market that solves issues with state-of-the-art products. Talon reached out to coating applicators asking them what the industry is needing for an answer to their problems. After putting together a composite wish list of parameters, Talon spent over 18 months developing a thin film ceramic coating, TalonCOAT, which can be oven cured or ambient cured, currently making it the only coating in the market that can do both. This gives the applicator an advantage to use TalonCOAT in the field or in a shop setting. Talon is working with applicators to provide their clients with an alternative coating solution.

Name: NEXTGEN Reliability
Description:
Nextgen Reliability is focused on improving how maintenance and reliability are understood and applied in modern industry.
Many reliability problems are not caused by a lack of effort, data, or tools. They are caused by outdated assumptions, over-maintenance, poor decisions, and a misunderstanding of how equipment actually fails.
Nextgen Reliability exists to challenge that thinking.
We publish practical insights on reliability, maintenance, asset management, and engineering decision-making, with a strong focus on mining, power generation, and heavy industry. Our content is written for engineers, planners, leaders, and new starters who want clarity, not complexity.

A key part of our work is the Reliability Myth Busters series, where we challenge common beliefs such as:

•	“Preventive maintenance prevents failures”
•	“More sensors automatically improve reliability”
•	“If it hasn’t failed yet, it’s reliable”

Our goal is simple:
Help organisations reduce risk, make better decisions, and build reliability in ways that actually work.
________________________________________
Topics we cover
•	Reliability fundamentals
•	Maintenance strategy and optimisation
•	Failure modes and risk thinking
•	Preventive vs condition-based maintenance
•	Human and organisational factors
•	Practical lessons from industry
________________________________________
Our approach
•	Evidence-based, not opinion-driven
•	Simple explanations, not academic language
•	Focus on decisions and outcomes, not activity

If you’re interested in modern reliability thinking and practical insight that challenges the status quo, you’re in the right place

Name: Walker Marine Geophysical Company
Description:
Walker Marine Geophysical Company is a full-service marine and land geophysical firm based in Boca Raton FL, Jacksonville, FL and Laramie, WY. Walker Marine specializes in shallow marine and transition zone high frequency seismic data acquisition. Our marine capabilities also include towed resistivity, magnetometer, side scan sonar, multibeam, deep towed streamer and autonomous node surveys. Additionally, we offer upland 2D and 3D seismic services using standard land cables, state-of-the-art autonomous nodes with downhole air gun, explosive and INOVA vibrator sources. We also offer near-surface imaging using ground penetrating radar (GPR) and resistivity.

Walker Geophysical was founded in 1979.  Our seismic technology evolved from 1977 when Walker took on a project for Peabody Coal Company to map coal in advance of underground mining. Peabody had recently mined into an old abandoned mine (major safety hazard) and requested seismic imaging from the surface to locate the extent of the unknown mine. We were successful in locating two new void areas ahead of mining that had (illegally) been mined out in the early 1930's. At the time, Walker had modified a standard Texas Instruments seismograph (TI-10000) for high frequency recording and made "permissible" explosive charges for the wideband seismic source. The following year Walker contracted Texas Instruments to build a custom high resolution DFS-V system with 4kHz sampling and branched out into exploration not only for coal and underground mining hazards, but shallow oil and gas, minerals, construction site characterization, water resources and well site characterization.

In 1983, Walker expanded to overseas operations with Project Probe, a seismic survey of Lake Tanganyika. Over the course of the next 40 years, Walker Marine Geophysical has worked on land and marine projects throughout the US, and overseas, from Africa, South America, Australia and New Zealand, to Mauritius, the Middle East and Indonesia.

Name: NAPE North America Chapter
Description:
The Nigerian Association of Petroleum Explorationists started as Lagos Society of Geologist and Geophysicist from the idea of a young man named Akomeno Oteri, who felt it was desirable to have such a professional society for furthering both social and technical interaction among professional colleagues. The idea was developed after he attended one of the monthly meetings of the Society of Exploration Geophysicists in Dallas USA.

The name later changed to the Nigerian Association of Petroleum Explorationists (NAPE) to accommodate colleagues in other parts of the country. The society which started with only 10 people attending the inaugural meeting at Federal Palace Hotel in August 1975 now has over 9,000 individual members and about 100 supporting corporate members

Name: Blue Hawk BTC
Description:
Unlocking Untapped Energy: The Stranded Gas Advantage
The North American energy landscape holds a hidden treasure: vast reserves of natural gas that remain unmonetized due to geographical isolation or lack of infrastructure. This phenomenon, known as ‘stranded gas,’ represents one of the largest untapped energy opportunities, with billions of dollars in wasted resources. Traditionally, these remote gas pockets have been uneconomical to transport to market, often leading to flaring – the burning off of excess gas – which is both an environmental concern and a significant economic loss. However, a revolutionary approach is transforming this challenge into a lucrative investment for passive investors: Wild Mining.

Name: truelevel
Description:
truelevel is an early-stage exploration technology company revolutionizing the way the world explores subsurface resources. Our proprietary Earth Insight technology is capable of detecting both organic and inorganic elements at unprecedented depths of up to 7,000 meters with 100% accuracy. We are dedicated to transforming the resource exploration industry by providing cutting-edge tools for oil, gas, and mineral discovery, especially in underdeveloped regions with untapped potential.

Whether it’s oil, minerals, or water, truelevel helps you unlock the unseen. We are actively seeking partners who share our vision of innovation and want to be a part of our journey.
Leveraging the principles of 'Field Matter Interaction' (FMI), we have developed a new technology, 'Field Matter Interaction Technology' (FMI Tech), which enables enhanced detection, identification, and quantitative measurement of biological, genetic, metallic, non-metallic, organic, and inorganic materials. 
truelevel has developed ‘Earth Insight’ Technology for  material detection and identification.
- truelevel has developed ‘Earth Insight’ Technology for  material detection and identification.
- Earth Insight combines electromagnetic spectrum, molecular spectroscopy and laser for enhanced detection capabilities.
- truelevel employs a proprietary method of integrating electromagnetic signals into a laser beam.
- Resulting in real time multi-dimensional, high-density new perspective remote sensing detection and fine analysis of geophysical space, internal structure.
- This focused RF signal excites matter, generating unique digital signatures at the molecular level which is extracted for remote detection and identification.
- The RF signal is precisely focused using laser, in one direction, preventing scatter.

Keep Your Worksite Safe. Improve site safety with Vac Stop, a protective structure for working around open excavations.

Our goal at Vac Stop is to create a safer work environment in the oilfield, improve site conditions, and set new standards for working around sumps & open excavations. Let's work together to plan, manage, and build safe sites that put your people and the environment first. 

Certified & OHS Compliant. Vac Stop offers a temporary protective structure for working around open excavations associated with water hazards, slippery/eroding, and unstable soil conditions. Vac Stop provides a solid foundation and equipment stop for mobile vehicles while maintaining a consistent setback allowing for the edge of the pit to be cut back eliminating straight cut banks for worker safety. 

Safety Around Open Excavations. Put risk management at the forefront of your oilfield projects with Vac Stop which provides a solid consistent setback from excavations. Piles or concrete blocks securely hold the unit in place and metal grating ensures better footing. Our wash-out platforms allow for safe clean-up while protecting workers within railings. Spills and overflow washout through the grating keeping your work area clean.

Protect Your Workers & The Environment. Today, safety in the workplace and for our environment is a driving force. Companies and employees need to be aware, adapt, and meet new challenges in order to keep themselves and their worksites safe. Whether you're setting up a new site or improving conditions at an existing one, mitigating hazards is essential, it protects you, improves production, and saves time.

At Elite Intellisense Ltd, integrity is not optional—it is foundational. We are committed to secure, compliant, and efficient energy trade, delivering confidence to our partners and value across the global energy supply chain.

Name: CRIT Global
Description:
CRIT Global team has 30 years of combined experience in designing, building, fabricating, maintaining, and operating artificial lift rod pumps & heavy machinery in various industries.  Including the aboveground and underground mining mineral, processing, construction, manufacturing of oil and gas. 
The design team has had exposure to the most modern technologies used in these industries and have applied them to our design process. 

CRIT are proud to Introduce the most innovative artificial lift rod pump technology to hit the oil and gas market since the invention of the beam pump 140 years ago. 
CRIT Global Designs Dynamic Rod Pump (DRP) 
This pump combines the best qualities of all artificial lift pump technologies on the market. While also addressing the negative impacts of installation and maintenance of other artificial lift pump technologies. 
The CRIT Global DRPs best features are:
the ability to adapt live to each particular well, throughout the life of the well, maximising production output against energy input. 
 Ability to change stroke length at a moment's notice, meaning each oil and gas site will only require one model of rod pump to achieve all their wells production output. 
Designed with the ability to separate from a polished rod, as well as rotating polished rods to limit damage and maintenance of the polished rod. 
Use hydraulics to power our DRP to efficiency turn energy into torque. 
The DRPs hydraulic power pack has the most innovative technologies to help reduce energy consumption with no compromise to the power output. 
All of these features make the CRIT Global, Dynamic Rod Pump one of the most environmentally friendly and profitable ways to produce in the oil and gas industry.

Name: Earth Decision Systems (EDS)
Description:
Earth Decisions Analytics (EDA) is a specialist geoscience and analytics consultant company focused on geological intelligence for Earth critical decisions, operating from the Andes to Asia. EDA integrates geoscience expertise, AI-assisted workflows, and digital Earth systems to support interpretation, exploration, and decision-making in complex and uncertain environments.

The work is grounded in sedimentology, stratigraphy, subsurface interpretation, geostatistics reasoning, applied across surface-to-subsurface Earth systems and extended to comparative Earth and planetary contexts. Digital methods and AI are used as decision-support tools, with a strong emphasis on human-led interpretation, transparency, and uncertainty awareness.

EDA’s specialty lies in bridging deep geological understanding with modern analytics, enabling clearer, more responsible decisions in exploration, natural resources, and Earth-system applications. The focus is not on automation for its own sake, but on clarity, accountability, and scientific rigor in how data and models inform real world decisions.

Name: Oliver Moorthy - Completion & Handover Specialist
Description:
Here are my tactical and operational Completion & Handover skillsets:

- Active team member in a multidiscipline work preparation team and be responsible for the development of the Completion plans, procedures, and Handover packs instructions in accordance with approved budget, schedule, QAQC and HSE requirements incorporated into completion certification activities.
-  Schedule completion work activities aligned with Completion Execution Plan. Play an active role in maintaining a safety culture while performing Completion duties and adhere to all applicable site(s) and project safety procedures.
-Perform data gathering from various engineering disciplines and be responsible for the engineering data population of the CMS and on-going data verification over the project life. Provide the standard design data sets required for the Completion Management System and as a minimum provide all equipment tags and associated loops, cable and line lists and Safety Critical items 
- Routinely check, review and validate disciplinary ITRs to ensure contractors correctly interpreted latest revision of AFC drawings to meet project specifications and aligned with CMS. Liaise with construction team and QAQC inspectors over any ITRs exception that are following the project specifications. All TQs submitted must be properly channeled through approved Management of Change (MOC) and close out prior to Area/Subsystem Mechanical Completion.
- Provide periodic updates to respective managers and raise any concerns that may impact handover in line with the project sub-system(s) delivery schedule. Also coordinate with QAQC on red line drawings verification, LOTO implementation and Quality packs that would form part of the Handover/Turnover dossiers.
- Develop and produce effective completions solutions applicable to the various aspects of the defined scope of work complying with relevant codes’ specifications and procedures.

My managerial Completion & Handover skillsets are as in main profile.

Description:
DAMet Services is a private company that was established to provide specialty supply, services and technical support to the Canadian blasting and explosives industry. In the area of custom blasting solutions, the company is currently providing turnkey drill and blast services to a major open pit mining operation in Alberta. In a more unique applications, it assisted with the creation of an artificial reef near Vancouver, BC,  cut 11 major power lines simultaneously on both sides of a major river in Calgary, AB,  disposed of 1500 pounds of old explosives in the high arctic, design system to vent & burn compressed flammable gases from truck and rail tankers.

Blaster training in the form of provincially approved courses (Alberta) dedicated to specific types of blaster certification are conducted on an irregular(as needed) bases but typical 2-5 courses per year. See our website for more details (www.damet.ca) on the training currently available.

Regulatory compliance support to assist companies of any size and individuals to obtain and maintain their federal licenses for purchasing and storing explosive materials.

The major infrastructure of North America is beginning to shows it age and more of these structures are requiring decommissioning. Many times the demolition of these structures are very time consuming and/or hazardous to complete. Explosive demolition is often the safest and most viable method to get the structure in a condition to be manageable from ground level for clean up and removal. DAMet has been involved in many structures in Canada requiring explosive demolition.

In 2017 the company became Canada's sole supplier of Air Show special effects capitalizing on the owners 20+ years experience in this industry.

DAMet is an Authorized Abloy Dealer providing key and lock services dedicated exclusively to the Canadian explosive industry. This division provides high security Abloy locks and custom built keys approved by the federal regulators and used in the Canadian explosive industry. 

The company is willing to look at any project or provide the services that require; sourcing, importation, storage, transportation, training for, or use of approved commercially explosives for Canada.

Name: Element One Hydrogen
Description:
Element One Hydrogen is a clean energy company combining the emerging field of geologic hydrogen exploration with critical minerals extraction and carbon sequestration. The company is focused on the identification and development of early-stage projects with significant potential to facilitate the long-term production of hydrogen, as well as related, in situ critical minerals, in a net negative carbon environment. By leveraging cutting-edge geological research and advanced exploration techniques, Element One targets areas rich in naturally occurring hydrogen accumulations, a critical and renewable energy resource poised to play a transformative role in the global energy transition. A primary feature of these hydrogen hosts is the coincident occurrence of metals identified as ‘critical minerals’ by both US and Canadian governments.

Element One’s prospect generator business model is centered around science, collaboration among disciplines and risk-sharing. The company identifies and acquires high-potential targets following desktop derisking involving extensive research and data review. Focused on-site exploration programs are initiated to further refine these high-quality hydrogen prospects, which are then developed further through strategic partnerships with joint venture (JV) partners. This approach allows Element One to diversify its portfolio, expand its reach, and accelerate project development timelines, all while mitigating financial exposure and capital expenditure.

Element One is collaborating with Cornell University, New England Research, and other leading institutions to advance the science and technology behind stimulated hydrogen production. This research is being funded through grants from the Department of Energy’s ARPA-E (Advanced Research Projects Agency-Energy) program, which focuses on innovative energy technologies with high transformative potential.

Name: Carbyne Group
Description:
Welcome to Carbyne Group's LinkedIn page!

We are a sustainable technology company dedicated to advancing the future of electric machines/vehicles, autonomous robotics, and sustainable energy. 
"Our mission is to create a stable business platform that supports research and development for future sustainability."

Carbyne Group has established multiple divisions to address different needs and opportunities in the sustainable technology industry. Our innovative approach to machine equipment will help us become a leader in interplanetary exploration, with the ultimate goal of designing and building the machines needed to mine asteroids and extract valuable resources.

Our divisions include Carbyne Concepts, Carbyne Mining, Carbyne Automotive, Carbyne Logistics, and Carbyne Parts. Each division is responsible for different aspects of our operations, from designing and building equipment to maintaining and transporting mined resources. Our strategic plan is to build each division into a stable, functioning, and profitable business.

Once we have achieved this, we will integrate all of our divisions to work together seamlessly towards our ultimate goal of becoming a leader in the asteroid mining industry. By creating a sustainable business model and building partnerships with other key players in the industry, we aim to establish a robust and profitable business that contributes to the future of sustainable technology.

We invite like-minded individuals and organizations to connect with us and explore potential partnerships towards achieving our shared vision. Thank you for visiting our page!

Our core focus is delivering software support and expert consulting services using CMG’s industry-leading reservoir simulation technologies—including IMEX, GEM, STARS, and CoFlow—to support advanced reservoir simulation and well performance modelling.

We also provide specialised training programs on reservoir simulation and well performance analysis, enabling clients to fully leverage CMG software and optimise technical and project outcomes.

Moreover, AEMA offers reservoir simulation studies, surface network modelling, dynamic data interpretation—including well test and formation test analysis—and production log evaluation. Our expertise also includes perforation optimisation (including dynamic underbalance design), integrated well and field performance evaluation, and robust reserve assessments to support Australia’s oil and gas sector—powered by CMG’s advanced simulation capabilities.

Name: Alvim Análises Ltda
Description:
Empresa com experiência em análise de gases combustíveis. Especializada em análise sensorial (odoração de gás) com foco em alerta e prevenção de acidentes. Ministra treinamentos técnicos específicos para empresas e profissionais ligados ao segmento de gases combustíveis.

Fornece consultoria para produtores de biometano proveniente de biogás gerado em aterros sanitários e estação de tratamento de esgoto. Monitora a qualidade de gases com ênfase na identificação e quantificação de compostos sulfurados, enxofre, metano, etano, propano, iso-butano, normal-butano, iso-pentano, normal-pentano, hexano, heptano, octano e hidrocarbonetos superiores. A análise do gás identifica e caracteriza a composição do fluxo gasoso, possibilitando calcular o poder calorifico superior, poder calorifico inferior, índice de woobe, fator de compressibilidade, densidade absoluta e densidade real, entre outras características físico químicas. O laboratório de análises também identifica o ponto de orvalho (umidade do gás) e possíveis contaminantes, como siloxanos, compostos orgânicos voláteis (VOCs), mercúrio, metais, amônia, particulados, sulfeto de hidrogênio, sulfeto de carbonila e enxofre total.

Membro da Associação Brasileira de Normas Técnicas (ABNT), com criação e revisão de normas brasileiras referentes ao gás natural, gás natural veicular, biogás e biometano.

Contamos con el respaldo de socios estratégicos como HALLIBURTON (Houston) y AQUAMONT (México), lo que nos permite aplicar tecnología de vanguardia en tratamiento de aguas, control de corrosión y servicios de laboratorio especializados.

Name: Onergies
Description:
EN 

Onergies is an independent organization committed to transparency, research, and sustainable innovation in the energy, mining, and environmental sectors. Its mission is to promote the responsible exploitation of natural resources, grounded in science, ethics, and data, in order to reconcile economic development, human health, and the preservation of nature.

Both an observatory, an information platform, and a think tank, Onergies produces and disseminates data, analyses, and scientific studies to inform public and private decision-making. It serves as a bridge between governments, companies, researchers, and citizens, fostering transparency, energy transition, and innovation in the service of sustainable development in Africa.

FR 

Onergies est un acteur indépendant engagé pour la transparence, la recherche et l’innovation durable dans les secteurs de l’énergie, des mines et de l’environnement. Sa mission est de promouvoir une exploitation responsable des ressources naturelles, fondée sur la science, l’éthique et la donnée, afin de concilier développement économique, santé humaine et préservation de la nature.

À la fois observatoire, plateforme d’information et laboratoire d’idées, Onergies produit et diffuse des données, analyses et études scientifiques pour éclairer les décisions publiques et privées. Il agit comme un pont entre gouvernements, entreprises, chercheurs et citoyens, en favorisant la transparence, la transition énergétique et l’innovation au service du développement durable en Afrique.

Name: IPR Independent Peer Review
Description:
The Independent Peer Review Board (IPRB) provides expert, objective evaluation of critical aspects of tailings management, including tailings deposition plans (Letter of Assurance - LoA), tailings transportation systems, and tailings dam safety. The IPRB ensures compliance with global best practices (e.g., GISTM, ICOLD, ANCOLD) and regulatory requirements while minimizing environmental and social risks.
1. Tailings Deposition Plans (Letter of Assurance - LoA)
Evaluation of deposition strategies (upstream, downstream, centerline, dry stack).

Assessment of beach slope management, water recovery, and segregation control.

Review of stability, consolidation, and long-term closure plans.

Verification of risk assessments (seismic, hydrological, climate change impacts).

2. Tailings Transportation Systems
Review of pipeline, conveyor, or trucking systems for efficiency and reliability.

Assessment of corrosion, wear, and failure risks in slurry transportation.

Evaluation of emergency spill containment and backup systems.

Compliance with industry standards (e.g., ASME, ISO).

3. Tailings Dam Design & Safety
Independent review of dam construction methods (zoned embankment, filtered tailings).

Validation of geotechnical stability, seepage control, and monitoring systems.

Confirmation of failure modes and consequences analysis (FMECA).

Alignment with Global Industry Standard on Tailings Management (GISTM).

Composition of the IPRB:
Geotechnical Engineers (dam stability, soil mechanics).

Hydrologists (water management, seepage).

Mining & Metallurgical Experts (tailings properties, deposition).

Risk & Safety Specialists (FMECA, emergency response).

Deliverables:
Formal review reports with findings and recommendations.

Gap analysis against regulatory and industry standards.

Verification of LoA (for investor and regulatory assurance).

Follow-up audits to ensure implementation.

Description:
Om selskapet og konsernet.
Nirak Company as, Norge, driver sin virksomhet på Skedsmokorset relatert til import og salg av høykvalitets smøremidler, antirustmidler og bilkjemiprodukter med tilhørende tjenester. I tillegg utøves utleie av næringseiendom og utleievirksomhet av boliger til B2C og B2B.

Hovedhendelser i 2022.
Konsernet oppnådde i 2022 en omsetning på kr 85.275.641 mot kr 78.388.432 i 2021. Årsoverskuddet ble kr 2.427.730 mot kr 2.525.307 i 2021. Konsernet hadde ved årets slutt en arbeidskapital på kr 11.297.245 mot kr 9.798.480 forrige år.
Selskapet og konsernet har hatt normal aktivitet i 2022. For konsernet beskrives markedsforholdene også i 2022 som krevende, men man oppnådde til tross for dette tilfredsstillende omsetning på hovedproduktene på konsernnivå. Også i 2022 har det vært fokus på kostnadsstyring. EURO-kursen har i 2022 skapt utfordringer, da hoveddelen av konsernets varekjøp skjer i denne valuta. På bakgrunn av konsernets strategi, har man fortsatt det målrettede arbeidet mot konsernets satsningsområder. Det vil bli iverksatt ytterligere fokus bl.a. på antirustbehandling med Tectyl som vurderes å kunne ha et betydelig potensial i årene som kommer. Teknisk kompetanse er et satsningsområde, sammen styrets og ledelsens fokus på bærekraftig salg av høykvalitets produkter og tjenester.
Konsernet arbeider kontinuerlig med tiltak for å effektivisere driften gjennom forbedrede rutiner og bedre utnyttelse av de administrative systemene.

Forskning og utvikling / Produktvikling.
Selskapet og konsernet arbeider ikke med forsknings- og produktutvikling, men samarbeider tett med sine partnere og leverandører som gjør dette.

Arbeidsmiljøet, ansatte og likestilling.
Det er en ansatt i selskapet. Ved utgangen av året var det 16 personer ansatte i konsernet. Arbeidsmiljøet vurderes som godt og konsernet har en egen plan for organisering av helse, miljø og sikkerhet. Sykefraværet i 2022 ble på ca. 5,5 % for konsernet, som skyldtes langtidsfravær.

Name: Coinergy, Inc.
Description:
In the US alone, natural gas producers flare nearly two billion cubic feet of gas each day. Even gas producers with midstream connections are lucky to netback a modest portion of Henry Hub after midstream losses. And midstream companies can get backed up, forcing producers to flare, potentially incurring fines.

Coinergy gives natural gas producers the ability to monetize gas which is currently flared, or replace their midstream company entirely with a more consistent partner which can match or even improve on the terms of their midstream contract.

PST Anatolia Çelik İç ve Dış Tic. Ltd. Şti., 2019 yılında mühendislik alanında uzman bir ekip tarafından kurulmuştur. Şirketimiz, kuruluşundan bu yana çelik boru bağlantı parçaları, flanş çeşitleri, borular ve hidrolik ürünler alanında güvenilir ve teknik açıdan doğru çözümler sunmayı hedeflemiştir.

Temel önceliğimiz,müşterilerimizin projelerinde ihtiyaç duydukları kalite standartlarını karşılayan, uzun ömürlü ve teknik olarak uygun çözümler geliştirmektir. Bu anlayışla farklı ölçeklerdeki projelere destek veriyor, iş ortaklarımız için güvenilir bir tedarikçi rolü üstleniyoruz.

Ürünlerimiz; sanayi tesisleri, otomotiv ve makine imalatı, enerji ve petrokimya endüstrisi, basınçlı kaplar, petrol ve doğalgaz hatları, hidrolik sistemler gibi kritik alanlarda tercih edilmektedir. Bu çeşitlilik, PST Çelik’in farklı sektörlerin teknik beklentilerine uyum sağlayabilen esnek yapısını göstermektedir.

Kalite ve güvenilirlik anlayışımızın temelinde, mühendislik disiplinine olan bağlılık yatmaktadır. Tedarik ettiğimiz her ürün ulusal ve uluslararası standartlara uygun şekilde seçilmekte ve müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına teknik doğruluk çerçevesinde sunulmaktadır. Böylece iş ortaklarımız, projelerinde kesintisiz güven ve verimlilik elde etmektedir.

PST Çelik, her iş birliğini uzun vadeli bir çözüm ortaklığı perspektifiyle değerlendirir. Bu yaklaşım sayesinde, projelerin planlama aşamasından uygulama süreçlerine kadar müşterilerimize teknik danışmanlık sağlayarak doğru ürün seçimini kolaylaştırıyoruz.

Bugün geldiğimiz noktada, profesyonel yaklaşımımız, kalite odaklı hizmet anlayışımız ve çözüm ortağı olma kararlılığımızla sektörde güvenilirliğimizi pekiştirmeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: Max Reclaim
Description:
The vice of innovation in mineral recovery — created to challenge how we think about tailings, waste, and value.

Every mine leaves something behind — and it’s time we stopped calling it waste. Across coal, iron ore, vanadium, mineral sands, base metals and rare earths, billions of tonnes of valuable material sit in tailings storage, waiting for smarter process design to set it free.

That’s where I focus my conversations:
– How do we recover the unrecovered?
– What role can automation and data play in precision separation?
– Can a tailings dam become a new revenue stream instead of a liability?

Through advances in fluid-dynamics control, water-only separation, automation, and digital process intelligence, we’re re-engineering how the mining industry approaches fines, moisture, and mineral liberation.

I share insights from real plant data, emerging technology, and process innovation to help engineers, operators, and decision-makers see the full potential of what’s already mined.

Reclaiming what matters isn’t just a slogan — it’s a smarter, more sustainable way to mine.

Name: Safety Check
Description:
Send safety checks to employees within 60 seconds during a crisis.
Your personalized crisis management assistant, ideal for safety professionals and Human resources teams to use during an emergency.

Benefits:

One person installs the bot for the entire team - no individual installs are needed.

Get real-time safety status updates of your employees during a crisis.

Works within Microsoft Teams - no additional software or accounts required.

Features:

Safety Checks : Send quick safety checks, prompting all employees to respond during crises and ensuring everyone’s accounted for.

SOS Alerts : Trigger an SOS alert in one click to notify your safety team instantly.

Centralized Dashboard : Monitor incident responses in real-time and manage all incidents from a user-friendly dashboard.

Pre-defined templates : Customize templates for safety checks, important bulletins, travel advisories, and stakeholder notices.

Use cases:

Earthquakes: Assess employee safety through quick safety checks, ensuring necessary assistance is promptly provided.

Fire: Issue fire alerts, coordinate evacuation procedures, and confirm employee safety to minimize panic and efficient resource allocation.

Active Shooter / Security Breach: Send safety checks to confirm employee safety, report injuries, and request immediate assistance for quick emergency response.

Working late at night? Enable SOS alerts for immediate notification to safety professionals.

Hurricanes / Floods / Wildfires: Send urgent evacuation alerts and shelter information, while notifying employees about emergency protocols and critical updates during active crises.

Storms, Tornadoes, or Heavy Snowfall: Communicate timely weather alerts and safety tips to keep employees informed and prepared for severe weather conditions.

Travel Restrictions: Update employees about travel restrictions and safety concerns during emergencies like natural disasters or political unrest, helping them make informed decisions.

Name: PT TNG Energy Services
Description:
PT TNG Energy Services – Company Overview

PT TNG Energy Services keeps drilling operations running cooler, safer, and more efficient across the Asia Pacific.

We are the original mud cooling specialists, providing Drill Cool GeoCooler rental fleets, engineering, and field services for geothermal and HPHT oil & gas wells. Our focus is simple: control drilling fluid temperature so your people, tools, and wells stay within safe operating limits.

What we do

Drilling Mud Temperature Management – Planning, sizing, and operating mud cooling systems for extreme bottom‑hole temperatures.
GeoCooler Rentals – Rapid‑deployment mud coolers and support equipment, locally available for short‑term or multi‑well campaigns.
Engineering & Optimization – Heat‑load modelling and system design to integrate cooling with your rig and fluids program.
Onsite Operations Support – Cooling specialists to commission, operate, and optimize performance.
Problems we solve

Overheated mud causing tool failures, NPT, and fishing
HSE risk from high surface temperatures at shakers and pits
Reduced bit and BHA life in HPHT and geothermal wells
Poor results from improvised or under‑designed cooling systems
Who we serve
Geothermal developers, drilling contractors, and E&P operators across Indonesia and the wider Asia Pacific who demand reliable, field‑proven mud cooling.

Call to action
If you’re planning a hot or geothermal well, visit pt-tng.com or email info@pt-tng.com to size a mud cooling solution and secure GeoCooler rentals for your next campaign.

Name: Ma'anshan Ping Wen Forging Co., Ltd
Description:
Ma'anshan Ping Wen Forging is a leading manufacturer of critical forged components, recognised for our API 20B certification, underscoring our commitment to quality, safety, and reliability for the oil and gas industry. 

Our vertically integrated facility handles all stages of production—forge, precision machining, heat treatment, and in-house testing—ensuring full traceability and superior metallurgical properties from raw materials to finished products.

Forging: We use powerful hydraulic hammers and precision manipulators for open die forging, enabling us to create complex geometries from various high-performance alloys. Our advanced simulation software guarantees optimal grain flow and mechanical properties. 

Precision Machining: We have a fleet of CNC machining centres and equipment that ensure final dimensions and surface finishes meet or exceed customer specifications. 

Heat Treatment: Our digitally controlled heat treatment facility includes robotic furnace systems calibrated to API standards. We conduct processes such as normalising, austenitising, tempering, and more, with meticulous documentation to ensure precise metallurgical outcomes. 

In-House Testing & Quality Assurance: We comply with API 20B and international standards, employing non-destructive and destructive testing methods, backed by a fully equipped metallurgical lab. Each shipment includes detailed Inspection Test Plans (ITP) and Mill Test Certificates (MTCs). 

In summary, Ma’anshan Ping Wen Forging is your strategic partner in delivering high-quality, performance-proven forged components that meet the rigorous demands of the global industrial landscape.

Name: Dedication Gas System
Description:
LPG Supply: The system begins with a central storage facility or depot where a large quantity of LPG is stored. This storage can be above ground or underground, depending on safety and regulatory requirements.

Distribution Network: From the central storage facility, a network of underground or overhead pipes is laid out to connect to various points of consumption. This network can be quite extensive, with pipelines branching out to serve multiple homes, buildings, or facilities.

Pressure Regulation: Pressure regulators and safety devices are installed at various points in the distribution network to ensure that the LPG is delivered at the correct pressure and in compliance with safety standards.

Metering and Billing: Gas meters are installed at each customer's connection point to measure the amount of LPG consumed. Customers are billed based on their actual usage.

Safety Measures: Gas reticulated systems through LPG are subject to stringent safety standards. Leak detection systems, emergency shutdown valves, and other safety features are installed to prevent and respond to gas leaks or other emergencies.

Maintenance and Monitoring: Regular maintenance and monitoring of the distribution network are crucial to ensure the safety and efficiency of the system. This includes inspecting pipelines, testing pressure, and checking for leaks.

Advantages of a Gas Reticulated System through LPG:

Convenience: Customers do not need to order or replace LPG cylinders or tanks regularly. The supply is continuous and automatic.

Space Saving: There is no need to store individual cylinders or tanks, saving space at homes or businesses.

Cost Efficiency: The system can be more cost-effective in the long run compared to purchasing and refilling individual cylinders.

Reduced Environmental Impact: LPG is a relatively clean-burning fuel, which can contribute to reduced greenhouse gas emissions when compared to other fossil fuels.

- Ensayos No Destructivos – NDT: UT, PAUT, TOFD, VT, MT, PT, MFL, ACFM, RFT, NFT, Guided Waves y técnicas avanzadas de diagnóstico.

- Ingeniería y Consultoría: simulaciones por elementos finitos (FEA/MEF), análisis estructural, ingeniería de soldadura, auditorías técnicas y soporte normativo API/ASME/AWS.
- Supervisión y Gestión de Proyectos: seguimiento de obra, QA/QC, control documental, cumplimiento normativo y soporte en inspecciones críticas.

NUESTRO VALOR DIFERENCIAL

- Uso de tecnologías avanzadas de inspección y modelado (PAUT, TFM, FEA, digitalización 3D).
- Metodologías basadas en estándares API, ASME, AWS, ASTM y BS 7910.
- Equipos certificados y especialistas con experiencia en operaciones reales.
- Enfoque en seguridad, confiabilidad y resultados comprobables.
- Acompañamiento técnico durante todo el ciclo de vida del activo.

DeepGeology is developing novel computational models and machine learning (neural networks) techniques for seismic imaging that aim in particular to develop a new technology that could reduce exploration and operational costs; speed up the exploration phase, locate untapped pockets of oil and gas or minerals in a reservoir or mineral deposits, and allowing for more new discoveries.

At DeepGeology, our vision is to develop advanced science and engineering tools to advance the hydrocarbons and mineral exploration industry and put it in a totally new light.

Nos especializamos en dragados, empleando equipos de última generación para la remoción de sedimentos y el mantenimiento de cauces, embalses y canales, asegurando el flujo óptimo y la capacidad de almacenamiento.

Ofrecemos servicios de inspección de tuberías utilizando tecnologías no invasivas, como cámaras robotizadas y sistemas de sonar, que permiten una evaluación precisa del estado interno de las conducciones sin interrupciones significativas en el servicio. Esta capacidad se complementa con nuestro diagnóstico de calidad de las tuberías (condition assessment), un análisis exhaustivo que determina la vida útil restante, identifica puntos débiles, corrosión, fisuras y otros deterioros estructurales. Empleamos herramientas avanzadas de detección y análisis de datos para proporcionar un informe detallado sobre la salud de la infraestructura, permitiendo la toma de decisiones informadas para el mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo.

Además, somos expertos en la evaluación y reemplazo de tuberías mediante tecnologías sin zanja (trenchless). Esta metodología innovadora minimiza la alteración del terreno, reduce los costos y los tiempos de ejecución, y disminuye el impacto ambiental y social. Implementamos técnicas como el encamisado (cured-in-place pipe - CIPP), el hincado de tuberías (pipe jacking) y la perforación direccional horizontal, ofreciendo soluciones eficientes y duraderas para la rehabilitación y expansión de redes.

En IBC, nuestro compromiso es entregar soluciones que optimicen la funcionalidad y prolonguen la vida útil de sus sistemas hidráulicos, con un enfoque en la innovación, la eficiencia y la mínima interrupción de las operaciones.

Name: Strategic Automation Solutions Inc.
Description:
An OTS (Operator Training Simulator) is composed of a dynamic process model that is integrated with a simulated control system. A well-designed training system will simulate the dynamic behavior of a process closely and provide trainees with a realistic training experience. This helps operators improve their operation and troubleshooting skills. The OTS provides an opportunity for management to evaluate and quantify operator competence in a controlled setting against an established performance standard. It enables operators to learn from mistakes without negative impacts to people, the environment and the plant. Most plants that do not use training simulators utilize mostly on-the-job training which doesn't always provide trainees with an opportunity to experience many of the most difficult scenarios. When a plant is running well, trainee operators can spend numerous shifts operating the plant without ever having to recover from an upset or perform startups and shutdowns. This means that trainees may never see and solve real problems firsthand until they encounter them in the plant which increases the likelihood of a suboptimal operator response. The use of the OTS is not just limited to trainee operators. Experienced operators can also benefit from using the simulator by practicing their response to various scenarios to maintain their familiarity with events that don’t happen very often which keeps their troubleshooting skills sharp. With the training from an OTS, operators will be better prepared to run their units efficiently and handle various upset scenarios in a standardized way.

OTS Services Provided:

	•	Functional design specification development
	•	Prototype development for key process units
	•	Hardware installation&comissioning
	•	Process modelling
	•	DCS Integration
	•	Training program theoretical content creation
	•	Training program scenario creation
	•	Instructor training "Train-the-Trainer"
	•	Project documentation

In order to do so, we bring you the power of muography, a groundbreaking imaging technology that harnesses cosmic ray muons to peer into solid objects and generate precise 3D images of their internal structures.
Imaging technology, including muography applications, offers several benefits to the environment. Here are some key advantages:
1. Non-Invasive and Non-Destructive
2. Early Detection of Environmental Risks
3. Improved Resource Management
4. Environmental Monitoring and Compliance
5. Conservation and Preservation
6. Waste Management and Leak Detection
7. Efficient Environmental Assessments
Overall, imaging technologies, including muography, offer valuable insights and tools for environmental monitoring, conservation, resource management, and early risk detection. They contribute to more sustainable practices, ensuring a healthier and more resilient environment for future generations.

Name: Welltuner
Description:
WellTuner – The Modern Way to See Below the Surface

WellTuner redefines fluid-level measurement and well diagnostics with a solid-state electroacoustic transducer that delivers continuous, precise, and safe readings—without gas shots, manual intervention, or downtime.

Engineered for artificial lift performance tuning and reservoir insight, WellTuner continuously analyzes acoustic reflections and surface signals to determine downhole conditions in real time. Integrated with the Synap platform, it powers machine learning models that automatically adjust lift parameters, enhance drawdown efficiency, and uncover evolving reservoir behavior.

From progressive cavity pumps (PCP) and gas-lift systems to rod-pumped wells, WellTuner turns acoustic data into actionable intelligence for production optimization, inflow analysis, and reservoir management—all without sending a technician to the field.

Measure smarter. Tune faster. Manage deeper.

OFT is a breakthrough electromagnetic exploration technology that detects energy resource fingerprints through anomalies and spectral signatures in the Earth's electromagnetic field. Unlike traditional methods, OFT provides uncompromising accuracy regardless of depth, delivering precise insights on geology, specific hydrocarbons, reservoir pressure, and temperature—all without energy transmission.
Proven Results Across 400+ Projects:
✓ 80% Cost Reduction – Streamlined exploration eliminates tens of millions in unnecessary expenditures
